name: Neutral Wounded Dog
summary: Set behavior of Wounded Dog as neutral to Dogmeat.
description:
You can randomly meet Wounded Dog and if you have Dogmeat as companion, then Wounded Dog can attack Dogmeat (result of faction policy). It will end not good for Wounded Dog and you probably cannot change it.
I meet Wounded Dog during tracking Kellog into Fort Hagen, Dogmeat did quick end of this event.

This mod add own faction for Wounded Dog and set neutral status to Dogmeat.

If you use mod for recruit Wounded Dog (https://www.nexusmods.com/fallout4/mods/60597), you will probably need patch.
Then load order will be:
Oxy_neutral_wounded_dog.esp
RecruitWoundedDog.esp
Oxy_NWD_RWD_patch.esp
author: Oxygenes

name: Cyber Engine Tweaks
summary: Scripting framework for modders and quality of life fixes.
description:
[size=3][url=https://wiki.redmodding.org/cyber-engine-tweaks/getting-started/installing][u][size=3]Please read the Wiki![/size][/u][/url]

[/size][b]Cyber Engine Tweaks[/b] is a framework giving modders a way to script mods using [url=https://www.lua.org/]Lua [/url]with access to all the internal scripting features, it also comes with a UI to configure the different mods you are using or using the console directly. It also adds some in game patches for quality of life (for example it fixed the security flaw that was then fixed with the 1.12 patch of the game), all of which can be enabled/disabled through the settings menu or config files.

As it stands the recommended method of installation is manual installation, however you can use vortex. Just drop the content of the zip file in the root folder of your game install.
When installing through vortex, make sure to use hardlink deployment.
If you wish to install manually please read the instructions on the [url=https://wiki.redmodding.org/cyber-engine-tweaks/getting-started/installing]wiki [/url].

[b][size=4]IMPORTANT!!!
[/size]You may need to install the latest Visual C++ Redistributable for the mod to run, you can get it at[/b] [url=https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vc_redist.x64.exe]https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vc_redist.x64.exe[/url]

No support will be provided here by developers, if you need help join us on [url=https://discord.gg/Epkq79kd96]discord [/url]﻿after having read the troubleshooting guide on the [url=https://wiki.redmodding.org/cyber-engine-tweaks/getting-started/installing/troubleshooting]wiki[/url]. Issues posted here are also not considered, if you want to report a bug do so [url=https://github.com/yamashi/CyberEngineTweaks/issues]here[/url]﻿. This is for posting actual bugs, not user error.

If you are a C++ developer and/or reverse engineer, you can contribute on [url=https://github.com/maximegmd/CyberEngineTweaks]github[/url].

[size=4][b]Supported version:[/b] [color=#00ffff][b]2.31[/b][/color][/size]
[b]
Bitcoin[/b]: bc1q0neujk5e8v8sc3934ajn8z8zav7hl6557fjj54
[b]Bitcoin Cash[/b]: qps5ze9p8fxmu4rszyxwy3g0ctlmrhvc3uqq0fzsnl
[b]Dogecoin[/b]: DMoReR33D87D6rYeUkyQb2BsEHJTqfBFva
[b]Ethereum[/b]: 0x7Cd23BE1C507Da85ABF0B05c7A3C03e6d3d0233B[url=https://www.patreon.com/tiltedphoques]

[/url]Thanks everyone for the donations, your support means a lot! A special shout-out to the anonymous bitcoin donator, you are crazy!
author: yamashi

name: RED4ext
summary: A script extender for REDengine 4.
description:
RED4ext is a library that extends REDengine 4. It will allow modders to add new features, modify the game behavior, add new scripting functions or call existing ones in your own plugins.

This library is similar to:
[list]
[*][url=http://dev-c.com/GTAV/scripthookv]Script Hook V[/url]
[*][url=https://skse.silverlock.org/]Skyrim Script Extender[/url]
[/list]
This library is split into two parts:
[list]
[*][url=https://github.com/WopsS/RED4ext]RED4ext[/url] - This project which consist of the loader, it only takes care of managing plugins.
[*][url=https://github.com/WopsS/RED4ext.SDK]RED4ext.SDK[/url] - This project contains the reversed types and helpers to extend the engine, it can be used independently of RED4ext.
[/list]
If you are developing a new plugin, add only [url=https://github.com/WopsS/RED4ext.SDK]RED4ext.SDK[/url] in your project structure.

[size=4]Installing[/size]

[list=1]
[*][b]Install [/b]the latest [url=https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vc_redist.x64.exe]Visual C++ Redistributable 2022[/url].
[*][b]Download [/b]the latest zip (e.g. [b]red4ext_x.y.z.zip[/b]) from [url=https://github.com/WopsS/RED4ext/releases/latest]GitHub [/url]﻿or [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/2380]NexusMods[/url]﻿.
[*][b]Extract [/b]the content of the archive in the game's directory.
[*][b]Launch [/b]the game.
[*]([b]Optional[/b]) Check the log file in [b]<game_directory>/red4ext/logs/red4ext.log[/b] to make sure everything works.
[/list]
[size=4]Uninstall[/size]

[list=1]
[*]Remove [b]winmm[/b][b].dll[/b] from [b]<game_directory>/bin/x64[/b].
[*]([b]Optionally[/b]) Remove [b]red4ext [/b]directory from [b]<game_directory>[/b].
[/list]
The complete / most up to date documentation is now available at [url=https://docs.red4ext.com]docs.red4ext.com[/url].
author: WopsS

name: redscript
summary: Compiler for Cyberpunk2077 scripts
description:
[img]https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/11986158/145491396-b987a964-4b45-460c-8864-9a78ebdff529.png[/img]

[size=4][b]REDSCRIPT[/b][/size]

This is a script compiler that can be integrated with the game and used to add/replace game scripts.
Source code available [url=https://github.com/jac3km4/redscript]here[/url].

[b]INSTALLATION[/b]
You'll need to download the archive available in the 'Files' tab and extract it in the main 'Cyberpunk 2077' directory.
You should end up with the following files in the game directory:
- Cyberpunk 2077\engine\tools\scc.exe
- Cyberpunk 2077\engine\config\base\scripts.ini

[b]NOTE FOR REDMOD USERS
[/b]There is a known compatibility issue with REDmod. To use redscript with REDmod you should to install either [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/2380]RED4ext[/url] (recommended) or [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/5176?tab=description]cybercmd[/url]. Do not install both. Once installed, the REDmod compatibility should be resolved.

[b]NOT WORKING?
[/b]If you are not sure if it's working or have any other issues, you should look for a log file at 'Cyberpunk 2077\r6\logs\redscript.log'.
This log file should end with 'Output successfully saved to ...' if the mods were applied successfully.
If the log file contains any errors or warnings, you can post them here to help with debugging.
If the log file isn't there, redscript has not been installed correctly.

[b]UNINSTALLING[/b]
The compiler saves a copy of the game scripts in a file 'Cyberpunk 2077\r6\cache\final.redscripts.bk'.
If you wish to uninstall redscript you can just remove the files you downloaded (scc.exe and scripts.ini) and replace the existing 'final.redscripts' with the backed up 'final.redscripts.bk' file.
author: jac3km4

name: ArchiveXL
summary: Archive extension loader
description:
[b][color=#f3e500][size=5]ARCHIVE-XL[/size][/color][/b]

ArchiveXL is a modding tool that allows you to load custom resources without touching original game files, thus allowing multiple mods to expand same resources without conflicts.

— Load custom entity factories (necessary for item additions)
— Add localization texts that can be used in scripts, resources and TweakDB
— Edit existing localization texts without overwriting original resources
— Override submeshes of entity parts
— Add visual tags to clothing items
— Create character customization options
— Create custom attachment slots
— Register world streaming blocks
— Manage journal entries
— Spawn widgets from any library

[color=#01fdfe][size=4]COMPATIBILITY[/size][/color]

✓ Cyberpunk 2077 2.31
✓ redscript 0.5.31+

[color=#01fdfe][size=4]INSTALLATION[/size][/color]

1. Install requirements
— [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/2380][color=#e3dee0]RED4ext[/color][/url] 1.29.0+

3. Extract the archive into the Cyberpunk 2077 directory

[size=2][color=#aaaaaa][i]You should have a "<Cyberpunk 2077>/red4ext/plugins/ArchiveXL" directory if done correctly.[/i][/color][/size]

name: Mod Settings
summary: Adds a redscript-configurable "Mod Settings" page to the main menu that any mod can add a page to.

Installation:
Install the requirements, and place the contents of mod_settings.zip directly into to your game's installation folder.

Allows mods to configure a tab under "Mod Settings" in the main menu, using only redscript. For an example, see here: https://github.com/jackhumbert/in_world_navigation/blob/main/src/redscript/in_world_navigation/InWorldNavigation.reds

name: Native Settings UI
summary: This mod allows other mods to easily add settings menus using only native UI, thus looking like the games settings menu
description:
[img]https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/justarandomguyintheinternet/keanuWheeze/nativeSettingsImages/main.gif[/img]
[b][i][color=#ff00ff][b][u][color=#00ff00][size=4][b][u][color=#00ff00][size=4][i][url=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/keanuWheeze]
[img]https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/justarandomguyintheinternet/keanuWheeze@main/buymeacoffee.png[/img][/url][/i][/size][/color][/u][/b][/size][/color][/u][/b][/color][/i][/b]

[color=#00ff00][size=4][b][u]What it does:
[/u][/b][/size][/color]- Lets other mods add their own page and add settings widgets to the newly added "Mods" settings menu
- Easy to use, and useful features such as option descriptions and resetting to default values
- Looks and behaves just like the normal settings menu
- Fully compatible with controllers (Obviously)
- Offers adding of new tabs and subcategories. Widgets are switches, sliders, list selectors, keybinds and buttons

[color=#ff0000][size=4][b][u]What it does not:
[/u][/b][/size][/color]- Offer a way of saving the settings or anything like that, this mod just provides the UI, what you do with it is up to you

[color=#00ffff][size=4][b][u]Installation:
[/u][/b][/size][/color]- Download the [b][color=#ff0000]LATEST [/color][/b]version of [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/107]CET[/url]
- Extract this mod into your base game folder (The one containing /bin)

[color=#00ff00][size=4][u][b]For modders:
[/b][/u][/size][/color]- If you want to use this mod, just add it to your mod's requirement list and nexus will prompt the user to download it[color=#ff0000][size=4][b][u]
[/u][/b][/size][/color]- For documentation and examples on how to add your own menu, please visit:
[center][color=#ff0000][b][url=https://github.com/justarandomguyintheinternet/CP77_nativeSettings][size=6]This mods GitHub Page[/size][/url][size=5]﻿[/size][/b][/color][/center]- Also feel free to ask me on the CP2077 Modding Discord

author: keanuWheeze

name: Material and Texture Override
summary: Enables the game to load new materials. Please read the description.
description:
[center][url=https://ko-fi.com/aarunim][img]https://uploads-ssl.webflow.com/5c14e387dab576fe667689cf/5c91bddac6c3aa6b3718fd86_kofisvglofo.svg[/img][/url][size=2]﻿[i]
[size=1]Mmm coffee.[/size][/i][i]

[/i][/size][/center][size=2][s][/s][/size][center][color=#666666][size=2][color=#ffffff][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-----------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/size][/color][/center][center][color=#b6b6b6][b]What:[/b][/color]
[color=#666666][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][size=4][size=2][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-----------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/size][/size][/color][/color][/color][/color]
[color=#ffffff][size=2][/size][/color][/color][/center][size=2]
[/size][center][size=2]This archive enables the game to load new materials and textures* by nullifying the material database files that index the games materials, it is required by everything and anything that uses new files of this type.

This file is future proof, ish, there should be no reason to update it for new patches, given they do not drastically change the way materials are indexed by the game, or do another expansion.

[/size][/center][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][size=2][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][size=2][center]It is highly recommended that you install the [color=#00ff00]Legacy [/color]version of this mod for the time being, and maybe forever.
The REDMod version, or REDMod itself perhaps, has reportedly been causing issues.

Both files have been updated for 2.0. [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/users/133308823]Kudos goes here[/url]. Thankyou.[/center][/size][/color][/color][/size][/color][/color]

[center][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][size=4][size=2][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-----------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/size][/size][/color][/color][/color][/color]
[color=#b6b6b6][b]Why:[/b][/color]
[color=#666666][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][size=4][size=2][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-----------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/size][/size][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/center][color=#666666]
[color=#ffffff][center][size=2]The game typically cannot load anything that is not present in it's material database, this is obviously an issue for modders.

Having duplicates of this file has caused issues in the past and the need for a single dedicated file arose, hi.[/size][/center]

[center][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][size=4][size=2][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-------------------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][color=#666666][color=#ffffff][color=#666666]-----------------------------------------------------[/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/color][/size][/size][/color][/color][/color][/color]

author: Nim

name: Equipment-EX
summary: Powerful transmog system and outfit manager
description:
[b][color=#01fdfe][size=5]EQUIPMENT-EX[/size][/color][/b]

— New transmog system with 50+ clothing slots
— A brand-new UI accessible from Hub menu and V's apartments
— Allows you to manage an unlimited amount of outfits with your names
— Converts your existing wardrobe sets to a new system at a first launch
— Works with vanilla and custom items

[b][color=#f3e500][size=4]COMPATIBILITY[/size][/color][/b]

✓ Cyberpunk 2077 2.31

[b][color=#f3e500][size=4]INSTALLATION[/size][/color][/b]

1. Install requirements
— [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/4198][color=#e3dee0]ArchiveXL[/color][/url] 1.26.0+
— [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/4197][color=#e3dee0]TweakXL[/color][/url] 1.11.3+
— [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/7780][color=#e3dee0]Codeware[/color][/url] 1.18.0+
— [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/2380][color=#e3dee0]RED4ext[/color][/url] 1.29.0+
— [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/1511][color=#e3dee0]redscript[/color][/url] 0.5.31+
2. Download the latest release
3. Extract the archive into the Cyberpunk 2077 installation directory

[size=2][color=#aaaaaa]You should have [i]<Cyberpunk 2077>/archive/pc/mod/EquipmentEx.archive[/i] and [i]<Cyberpunk 2077>/r6/scripts/EquipmentEx[/i][/color][/size]

[b][color=#f3e500][size=4]HOW TO USE[/size][/color][/b]

— The outfit manager is accessible through the new "Wardrobe" button in the Inventory menu or from wardrobe call in V's apartments
— On the right side of the screen, you will see all compatible gear grouped by slots
— By clicking on a button with three lines above the item list you can choose what items you want to see: current inventory, stash, wardrobe memory
— Clicking on any item will activate outfit mode, which applies the visuals of the selected items to your character over equipped gear
— To equip item in another slot, move cursor over the item and hold displayed hotkey (F on keyboard)
— To unequip all currently equipped items, move cursor over the preview puppet and press displayed hotkey (X on keyboard)
— On the left side of the screen, you will see a list of your outfits
— The "Save outfit" button becomes available when outfit mode is active
— To equip a previously saved outfit, just click on the name in the list
— To delete an outfit, hover over the outfit and press the hotkey from the hint (X on keyboard)
— To disable the outfit mode, you can select "No outfit" or unequip the outfit from the Inventory menu
— In photo mode, you will find the option to change outfits on the fly in the pose section

[b][color=#f3e500][size=4]DOCUMENTATION[/size][/color][/b]

▸ [url=https://github.com/psiberx/cp2077-equipment-ex#compatible-items][color=#e3dee0]How to make compatible items[/color][/url]
▸ [url=https://github.com/psiberx/cp2077-equipment-ex#appearance-suffixes][color=#e3dee0]How to make tights without clipping[/color][/url]
▸ [url=https://github.com/psiberx/cp2077-equipment-ex#translations][color=#e3dee0]How to translate mod to your language[/color][/url]
▸ [url=https://github.com/psiberx/cp2077-equipment-ex/wiki/Console-commands][color=#e3dee0]Console commands[/color][/url]

[b][color=#f3e500][size=4]COMMUNITY[/size][/color][/b]

Feel free to contact us on Discord if you need help with mod compatibility or have any other questions.
We prefer public discussions so that everyone can use shared knowledge.

▸ [url=https://discord.gg/redmodding][color=#e3dee0]Cyberpunk 2077 Modding Community[/color][/url]
▸ [url=https://discord.gg/z3dBY7PQNK][color=#e3dee0]Cyberpunk 2077 Modding[/color][/url]
author: psiberx and DJ_Kovrik

name: Reinforced Tendons ReChromed
summary:
Ever felt like Reinforced Tendons traded off too much to get double jump instead of a charge jump? Then this mod is for you!
This is only a simple change meant to bring the cyberware up to parity, so only the armor has been rescaled:
22 armor at Uncommon, increasing by 18 per Tier and 7 per 'Plus' upgrade, reaching to 90 at T5++
description:
This issue has bugged me in multiple games, where reinforced tendons felt like the 'worse' option nearly every time due to their armor scaling. This mod fixes that, by providing more armor to the legs, scaling in line with Fortified Ankles.

Due to the extra utility of double jumping, as well as its ease of use I purposely left them a bit worse on the armor as compared to Reinforced Tendons. The extra armor and Body attunement should help those still feel worthwhile (Fortified Ankles is still less armored, plus you don't get more HP from the Ankles' body attunement)

I won't attempt a comprehensive rebalance of the other legs mods, there are already better mods for that.
author: Maty83

name: AI Texting
summary:
AI generative texting with memories.
Live mode in person written conversations
description:
[b][size=3]AI Generative Texting Mod

[/size][/b](sorry about the shitty AI generated thumbnail, i am not a designer!)

This mod adds AI-generated texting to the in-game phone UI.
You can directly select NPCs and have dynamic conversations with them.

[b][size=3]Work in Progress[/size][/b]
This mod is still actively being developed, so expect bugs and ongoing changes.

[b][size=3]Credits[/size][/b]
This mod expands on the original work by Karkat and jmtokx.

[b][size=5]Features

[/size][/b]NPCs that can be interacted with have a "T" prompt next to their name in the phone UI.

[b][size=3]Persistent Conversations[/size][/b]

NPC chats persist between saves and loads.
However, conversations are not tied to individual save files — loading an older save will not roll conversations back. They will always continue from the most recent state.
[size=3]
[/size][b][size=3]NPC Memory System[/size]
[/b]
NPCs now have a basic memory system that can be triggered by the player.
Memories are stored externally and reloaded whenever you switch between NPCs.

[b][size=3]Live Mode[/size][/b]

A new “Live Mode” makes NPCs behave as if they’re speaking to you in person.
They will describe their thoughts, actions, and surroundings alongside dialogue.

[b][size=3]Expanded Contacts[/size][/b]

Includes additional custom NPCs who were not available as phone contacts in the base game.
[b]
[size=3]Dynamic Relationship System[/size][/b]

Panam and Judy now track mission progress.
Completing their quests updates their personality and dialogue.
A hidden friendship system improves how they interact with you over time.
This system is overridden if Romance mode is enabled.
[b]
[size=3]AI Setup (Important)[/size][/b]

This mod is designed specifically for use with Google AI.
Due to strict token limits and daily usage caps, it’s strongly recommended to generate multiple API keys and add them to the top of:
GenerativeTextingUtilities.reds

Get your API keys here:
[url=https://aistudio.google.com/]https://aistudio.google.com/
[/url]
Auto API Switching is included. If one key fails, the mod will automatically switch to the next.
[b]
[size=3]Controls[/size][/b][size=3]
[/size]
O – Force the AI to initiate a conversation

1 – Create a memory snapshot

[b][size=3]Live Mode Commands
[/size][/b]+ (Stage Direction)
Use this to guide the AI narrative.
Best practice: refer to the NPC in third person.

Example:
+Judy feels sick and walks to the sink for a drink

* (Player Action)
Use this to describe your own actions. The AI will respond accordingly.
Example:
[i]*I pull out my phone and scroll through my contacts*[/i][list]
[/list]Try to keep actions to one or two per message for best results.

[b][size=3]Mod Settings[/size][/b]

Songbird Ending

Select your chosen ending for Songbird. This affects her dialogue and context.

[b][size=3]Time Awareness[/size][/b]

NPCs are aware of the in-game time.
[b]
[size=3]Courting Mode[/size][/b]

Adds light romantic tension without full romance.
Requires Romance mode to be off.

[b][size=3]Romance Mode[/size][/b]

NPCs will behave as your romantic partner.
(Yes, it goes there, so you don’t need to ask.)

[b][size=3]V Background (Coming Soon)[/size]
[/b]
This feature will allow you to define your V’s background, which NPCs will take into account during conversations.

name: Lock semantic attribute entries
summary: Can lock the attribute entries that refresh after semantic upgrade, and it is the maximum value.
description:
Open int.lua in MOD and modify the code under the first line of desired modifiers based on the attribute comparison table provided in MOD
 The MOD has been modified
 "Modifiers.CritDamageRandom",                                 Lock critical strike damage
 "Modifiers.HeadshotDamageMultiplierRandom",        Lock the head injury multiplier
 "Modifiers.StealthHitDamageBonusRandom",             Lock stealth damage bonus
Modify the desired attributes according to the format in the file and save them. If you don't want all semantic attributes to be the same, you can add more entries. If there are more than 3 entries, they will not be the same every time you upgrade and refresh.
This MOD has set the refreshed attribute values to the maximum after upgrading.
author: cangfeng And Lock semantic attribute entries

name: Dedra's GTA V Style Loading Screen Replacer (Cyberpunk 2020 RED)
summary: This mod replaces the game’s loading screens with GTA V-style visuals using Cyberpunk 2020 and RED artwork.
description:
[color=#ea9999][size=5][b]What is this mod?[/b][/size]
[/color][size=4]This is a simple mod that replaces [b][u]ALL[/u] [/b]loading screens (including DLC and the main game), inspired by Grand Theft Auto.[/size]

[size=4]This work was created in collaboration with [url=https://www.reddit.com/user/Corgi_SBS/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button]Corgopolis [/url]on Reddit.
[/size]
[size=4]This project was made by coloring the Cyberpunk Red 2020 black and white materials using both hand/digitally (by me and [/size][url=https://www.reddit.com/user/Corgi_SBS/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button]Corgopolis [/url][size=4]). The backgrounds behind the characters are either official concept art or released in-game screenshots, arranged to create a GTA V-style loading screen in an immersive way. [/size]

[size=4]This project was mainly a passion project, and I hope you enjoy it too.[/size]

author: Dedra

name: Combat Anywhere-ish
summary: This mod removes a good amount of combat restricted nodes in numerous areas.
description:
[color=#444444][left][color=#e06666][size=6][b]

I'm back from the dead :)


This mod allows V to fight in majority of the clubs and bar areas in Night City.......That's... Pretty much it.

[/b][/size][/color][list]
[*][color=#ffffff][size=6][b]-Major clubs have no restrictions.[/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#ffffff][size=6][b]-Bars have no restrictions. [/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#ffffff][size=6][b]-That one area in Heywood has no restrictions.[/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#ffffff][size=6][b]
[/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#00ff00][size=6][b]More can be done, let me know where the spot is.

WHAT WASN'T TOUCHED?

[/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#00ff00][size=6][b]-Apartments.[/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#00ff00][size=6][b]-High class bar.[/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#00ff00][size=6][b]-DLC areas.[/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#00ff00][size=6][b]-Lizzie's bar. (oversight but let me know if you want that covered too.)[/b][/size][/color]
[*][color=#00ff00][size=6][b]-Majority of vendors. (let me know if you want me to go crazy and do every. single. vendor.)[/b][/size][/color]
[/list][color=#e06666][size=6][b]

[/b][/size][/color][color=#ffff00][size=6][b]INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS:[/b][/size][/color][color=#e06666][size=5]
[b]- Download the mod Manually. (ooo scary).
[/b]
[/size][/color][color=#e06666][size=6][b]- the folder is called "Combat_anywhere". unzip the folder.

- Open the "Combat_anywhere" folder, you will see a folder named "archive".

-Click and hold on that "archive" folder and drag it into your \Cyberpunk2077 folder, aka the Directory.

- Once you do all that, you will see the "archive" folder in your \Cyberpunk2077 folder be highlighted.

- That's it. play the game and go crazy in a club.......or wherever you think I did a removal on.






[/b][/size][/color]



[/left][/color]
author: Eli

name: Anti-Tracking Breach
summary: Allows you to interrupt a hack that reveals the player's position via Breach Protocol.
description:
[center][size=6][b]Anti-Tracking Breach[/b][/size][/center]



[size=5][b]? Overview[/b][/size]

Ever felt helpless when an enemy netrunner starts tracing your location? Not anymore! [b]Anti-Tracking Breach[/b] gives you the power to fight back against the “Reveal Position” quickhack by launching a counter-hacking minigame.

When an enemy attempts to trace your location, you’ll receive an alert and can choose to disrupt the trace by completing a hacking minigame. Success means staying hidden – failure comes with consequences.

[size=3][b]? Version 2.0[/b][/size]
[b]Perk Requirement System[/b]: New optional perk requirements for all major features:
[list]
[*]Requires Counter-A-Hack perk to use manual breach disruption.
[*]Requires Counter-A-Hack perk to use auto-disrupt.
[*]Requires Counter-A-Hack perk to use counterhack.
[/list][b]Intelligence-Based Cost Reduction[/b]: New INT-based RAM cost reduction system:
[list]
[*]RAM Cost Reduction Per INT - Percentage reduction of RAM cost per Intelligence point for manual disrupt.
[*]Auto-Disrupt RAM Cost Reduction Per INT - Same for auto-disrupt feature.
[/list][b]Counterhack System[/b]: Complete counterattack feature implementation:
[list]
[*]Enable Counterhack - Apply SystemCollapse hack to tracking enemy on successful breach.
[*]Counterhack Chance Per INT - Percentage chance per Intelligence point to trigger counterhack.
[/list][b]Adds compatibility with the "Hack The Planet For Real" mod[/b]


[size=5][b]✨ Features[/b][/size]

[*][b]Interactive Trace Disruption[/b] – When being traced, a prompt appears allowing you to start a hacking minigame to interrupt the trace
[*][b]Configurable Minigame[/b] – Customize time limit, buffer size, and grid complexity
[*][b]RAM Cost System[/b] – Disrupting traces costs RAM, adding tactical depth
[*][b]Auto-Disrupt Option[/b] – Automatically interrupt traces if you have enough RAM (configurable cost)
[*][b]Risk/Reward Mechanics[/b] – Failing the minigame results in immediate reveal plus negative status effects (Electrocuted & Cyberware Malfunction)
[*][b]Full Mod Settings Support[/b] – All options accessible via in-game Mod Settings menu


[size=5][b]? How It Works[/b][/size]

[*]An enemy netrunner initiates a “Reveal Position” trace on you
[*]A [b]”Tracing Detected”[/b] prompt appears on screen
[*]Press [b]F[/b] (or your interaction key) to attempt disruption
[*]Complete the hacking minigame before time runs out
[*][color=green][b]Success[/b][/color] → Trace is interrupted, you stay hidden
[*][color=red][b]Failure[/b][/color] → Immediate reveal + Electrocuted + Cyberware Malfunction


[size=5][b]? Requirements[/b][/size]

[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/2380]RED4ext[/url]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/1511]redscript[/url]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/4885]Mod Settings[/url]


[size=5][b]? Installation[/b][/size]

[*]Make sure all requirements are installed
[*]Download the main file
[*]Extract the archive into your Cyberpunk 2077 game folder
[*]The folder structure should be: Cyberpunk 2077/r6/scripts/AntiTrackingBreach/
[*]Launch the game and configure via Mod Settings



[size=5][b]? Uninstallation[/b][/size]

Simply delete the AntiTrackingBreach folder from: Cyberpunk 2077/r6/scripts/

name: Edited Dialogue
summary: Removes spoken profanity from dialogue audio in Cyberpunk 2077 by muting offensive words at the word level. Dialogue timing and performances remain intact. This mod only edits audio—subtitles and written text are unchanged. Ideal for players who want a cleaner listening experience.
description:
This mod removes or mutes profanity in the [b]spoken dialogue audio[/b] of [b]Cyberpunk 2077[/b], creating a cleaner listening experience while preserving the game’s story, performances, and gameplay.Profanity in voice lines is [b]muted at the word level[/b], allowing the original dialogue timing, acting, and pacing to remain intact. The mod focuses strictly on [b]audio edits[/b] and does [b]not modify subtitles or other written text[/b].This is ideal for players who want to experience Cyberpunk 2077 with reduced explicit language while maintaining the original narrative and cinematic presentation.[line]✨ Features? Profanity Muted in Dialogue Audio[list]
[*]Offensive words in voice lines are [b]silenced at the word level[/b].
[*]Dialogue pacing and performance remain natural.
[/list]? Original Performances Preserved[list]
[*]Voice acting remains otherwise untouched.
[*]Only targeted words are muted.
[/list]? No Text Changes[list]
[*]Subtitles and written dialogue remain unchanged.
[*]This mod focuses [b]only on spoken profanity[/b].
[/list][line]? Related ModsFor a more complete profanity-filtered experience, consider combining this mod with others:[list]
[*][b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/3836]Text Profanity Removal Mod[/url]﻿[/b] – Censors or removes profanity from written dialogue and subtitles.
[*][b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/3833]Advertisement Clean-Up Mod[/url]﻿[/b] – Removes or alters explicit advertisements and signage throughout Night City.
[/list]Using these together can create a broader content-filtered experience across dialogue, text, and world elements.[line]?️ Installation[list=1]
[*]Navigate to your Cyberpunk 2077 installation folder.
[*]Open the directory:
[/list][code]Cyberpunk 2077/archive/pc/mod/[/code][list=1]
[*]Copy the mod file into the [b]mod[/b] folder.
[*]Launch the game.
[/list]If the [code]mod[/code] folder does not exist, create it.[line]? Compatibility[list]
[*]✅ Compatible with most gameplay, visual, and UI mods.
[*]❌ Not compatible with mods that modify the [b]same dialogue audio files[/b].
[/list]If another mod replaces the same audio files, whichever loads last will take priority.[line]? Why This Mod?This mod was created for players who:[list]
[*]Prefer games without strong spoken profanity
[*]Want to share the game with [b]teens or younger players[/b]
[*]Want to keep the [b]original performances and story intact[/b]
[/list]It provides a cleaner listening experience without altering gameplay or narrative content.[line]? Tools Used[list]
[*]WolvenKit
[*][url=https://github.com/mmguero/monkeyplug]Monkeyplug[/url]﻿
[*]Cyberpunk 2077 modding utilitie
[/list]

name: Cyberpunk Glitch FPS
summary: Cyberpunk Glitch FPS - A completely original mod, created from scratch, which displays a Stylish and informative FPS Hood for Cyberpunk 2077. The mod is implemented with a unique visual and functional concept
description:
[b][color=#00ff00]﻿﻿Cyberpunk[/color] [color=#ffff00]Glitch[/color] [color=#ff0000]FPS[/color][/b] - Полностью оригинальный мод, созданный с нуля, который выводит Стильный и информативный FPS-Худ для [b]Cyberpunk 2077[/b]. Мод реализован с уникальной визуальной и функциональной концепцией
Для Cyberpunk 2077 уже существуют другие моды для отображения FPS.
    [b]Пример: [/b][b][color=#ff7700][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/3702][color=#ff7700]Simple fps monitor[/color][/url]
[/color][/b]    [b]Пример:[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/13957] [/url][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/13957][color=#ff7700]Simple FPS Counter[/color][/url][/b]
[color=#f4f4f4]﻿Данный мод является альтернативной реализацией с собственным кодом, визуальным стилем и функционалом, включая глитч-эффект цифр, анимированные предупреждения и настраиваемый HUD[/color]
[b][color=#00ff00]﻿﻿Cyberpunk[/color] [color=#ffff00]Glitch[/color] [color=#ff0000]FPS[/color][/b] - A completely original mod, created from scratch, which displays a Stylish and informative FPS Hood for [b]Cyberpunk 2077[/b]. The mod is implemented with a unique visual and functional concept
For Cyberpunk 2077, there are already other mods for displaying FPS.
    [b]Example: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/3702][b][color=#ff7700]Simple fps monitor
[/color][/b][/url][/b]    [b]Example: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/13957][color=#ff7700]Simple FPS Counter[/color][/url][/b]
﻿This mod is an alternative implementation with its own code, visual style and functionality, including a number glitch effect, animated warnings and a custom HUD
And also special thanks to [color=#ff7700][b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/users/105393778][color=#ff7700][b]anygoodname[/b][/color][/url] [/b][/color]for pushing me to write code from 0

[u]Изменения/[/u]Changes[u] v4.1.1:[/u]
[list]
[*]Добавлен режим [color=#ff0000][b]!!! [/b][/color][b][color=#ff0000]СИСТЕМНЫЙ СБОЙ !!![/color][/b] при FPS < 20 [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] Added [color=#ff0000][b]!!![/b] [/color][b][color=#ff0000]SYSTEM CRASH !!![/color][/b] mode at FPS < 20
[*]Усилен глитч и тряска при низком FPS [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] Increased glitch and shaking at low FPS
[*]Динамический глитч теперь зависит от текущего FPS [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] Dynamic glitch now depends on current FPS
[*]Текстовые уведомления и визуальные эффекты для экстремальных просадок FPS [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] Text notifications and visual effects for extreme FPS drops
[*]﻿Теперь ваш FPS-счётчик «живет» вместе с системой. Он реагирует только на реальные просадки и предупреждает вас о критических фризах, сохраняя спокойствие интерфейса в остальное время. Эффекты, тряски и фан-сообщения минимизированы, чтобы вы видели только то, что важно - чистые данные о производительности, в духе настоящего Cyberpunk HUD [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] Jetzt „lebt“ Ihr FPS-Zähler mit dem System. Es reagiert nur auf echte Drawdowns und warnt Sie vor kritischen Einfrierungen, sodass die Benutzeroberfläche den Rest der Zeit ruhig bleibt. Effekte, Verwacklungen und Fannachrichten werden minimiert, sodass Sie nur das Wesentliche sehen – reine Leistungsdaten, ganz im Sinne eines echten Cyberpunk-HUD
[/list][b][u]v4.1.1[/u][/b]
[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/3333/images/28256/28256-1773750005-2102950571.gif[/img]
[b][u]v4.1[/u][/b]
[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/3333/images/28256/28256-1773683328-1491625224.gif[/img]

[b][size=4][u]Две языковые версии[/u][/size][/b]
[list]
[*][b]Русская версия[/b][b] - [/b]Текстовые уведомления и фан-сообщения на Русском языке, включая предупреждения о падении FPS
[*][b]Английская версия[/b][b] - [/b]Текст полностью на английском языке, для международной аудитории
[/list][b][size=4][u]Two language versions[/u][/size][/b]
[list]
[*][b]Russian version - [/b]Text notifications and fan messages in Russian, including FPS drop warnings
[*][b]English version -[/b] Text entirely in English, for an international audience
[/list]           ﻿                           
[b][u]Основные функции и стиль[/u][/b]
[list]
[*][b]Цифровой счётчик FPS[/b] с глитч-эффектом, создающим «Цифровую коррумпированность»
[*][b]Анимация появления и дрожания текста[/b] при падении FPS, визуально подчеркивающая нагрузку на систему
[/list][b]         Цветовое кодирование FPS:
[/b]              [b][color=#00ff00]Зелёный[/color][/b] [b]- [/b]Стабильный FPS [b](>60)[/b]
              [b][color=#ffff00]Жёлтый[/color][/b] [b]- [/b]Средний FPS [b](30-60)[/b]
[b]                [color=#ff0000]Красный[/color][/b] [b]- [/b]Критическое падение [b](<30)[/b]

[u][b]Key Features and Style[/b][/u]
[list]
[*][b]Digital FPS counter[/b] with glitch effect creating “Digital Corruption”
[*][b]Animation of text appearing and shaking[/b] when FPS drops, visually highlighting the load on the system
[/list][b]         FPS color coding:
[/b]             [b][color=#00ff00]Green[/color] - [/b]Stable FPS [b](>60)[/b]
             [b][color=#ffff00]Yellow[/color] - [/b]Average FPS [b](30-60)[/b]
             [color=#ff0000]Red[/color][b] - [/b]Critical Fall [b](<30)[/b]

[u][b]Всплывающие текстовые сообщения при падении FPS / Pop-up text messages when FPS drops:[/b][/u]
[list]
[*]"[color=#ff7700]Ого! FPS упал![/color]" [color=#ff00ff][size=4]•••[/size][/color] "[color=#ff7700]Whoa! FPS dropped![/color]"
[*]"[color=#ff7700]Лаг-спайк![/color]" [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] "[color=#ff7700]Lag spike!![/color]"
[*]"[color=#ff7700]Внимание![/color]" [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] "[color=#ff7700]Warning![/color]"
[*]"[color=#ff7700]Система нагружена![/color]" [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] "[color=#ff7700]System under load![/color]"
[*]"[color=#ff7700]Держись...[/color]" [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] "[color=#ff7700]Hang in there...[/color]"
[*]"[color=#ff0000]!!ПАДЕНИЕ FPS!![/color]" [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] "[color=#ff0000]!!FPS DROP!![/color]"
[*]"[color=#ff0000]!!![/color][color=#ff0000]СИСТЕМНЫЙ СБОЙ!!![/color]" [color=#ff00ff]•••[/color] "[color=#ff0000]!!![/color][color=#ff0000]SYSTEM CRASH!!![/color]"
[/list]Сообщения появляются автоматически при резком падении FPS, меняют цвет и исчезают плавно
Messages appear automatically when FPS drops sharply, change color and disappear smoothly

[u][b]Настройки HUD через JSON-файл[/b][/u]
[list]
[*]Позиция на экране (x, y)
[*]Масштаб шрифта
[*]Включение/Выключение глитч-эффекта
[*]Включение/Выключение графика FPS
[*]Настройка интенсивности глитча
[*]Порог срабатывания предупреждений
[*]Стиль графика (Линии/Бары)
[*]Включение/Отключение фан-сообщений при падении FPS
[/list][u][b]HUD settings via JSON file[/b][/u]
[list]
[*]Position on screen (x, y)
[*]Font scale
[*]Enable/Disable glitch effect
[*]Enable/Disable FPS graph
[*]Setting glitch intensity
[*]Alert threshold
[*]Chart style (Lines/Bars)
[*]Enable/Disable fan messages on FPS drop
[/list]
[b]Назначение клавиши/Key assignment[/b]
[list]
[*]В[b]  [/b][b][color=#ff7700][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/107]Cyber Engine Tweaks (CET)[/url]﻿[/color] [/b]можно назначить клавишу для Активации/Деактивации счетчика FPS
[*]In[b] [/b][color=#ff7700][b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/107]Cyber ​​Engine Tweaks (CET)[/url]﻿ [/b][/color]you can assign a key to Activate/Deactivate the FPS counter
[/list]
[b][u]Удаление/Removal[/u][/b]
[list]
[*]Удалите папку[b] GlitchFPS [/b]по пути [b]Cyberpunk 2077 > bin > x64 > plugins > cyber_engine_tweaks > mods[/b]
[*]Delete the folder[b]  GlitchFPS [/b]on the way[b] Cyberpunk 2077 > bin > x64 > plugins > cyber_engine_tweaks > mods[/b]
[/list]
