name: SoulsChat
summary: What if Elden Ring had a text chat?
description:
[b]SoulsChat[/b] adds a simple, direct text chat system.

[b][size=4]How it works[/size]

[/b][list]
[*][b]SteamSDK Integration:[/b] Uses native Steam Networking (P2P).
[*][b]Direct Communication:[/b] Messages are sent directly to other mod users in your session. No central server handles your chat messages.
[*][b]Auto-Discovery:[/b] It automatically finds other SoulsChat users in your game session. When someone with the mod joins the session, you will receive a system message.
[/list]

[b][size=4]Text Filtering[/size]

[/b]SoulsChat uses the [b]Steam Text Filtering API[/b] to manage chat content.

[list]
[*][b]Control via Steam:[/b] Your chat filter settings are controlled directly by your Steam Client settings.
[*][b]How to edit:[/b][list=1][*]Click on your profile > Store preferences
[*]Community Content Preferences
[/list]
[/list]
[img]https://i.ibb.co/tpdRLmTp/image.png[/img]﻿

[b][size=4]
How the filtering works
[/size][/b]
Filtering is applied [b]only on incoming messages[/b], not outgoing ones.

This means:[list]
[*]When you send a message, [b]you will still see it normally in your chat[/b].
[*]However, [b]the recipient may see the message as filtered[/b] if they have selected the '[b]Filter strong profanity and slurs[/b]' option, or have added words from your message to their custom filter list.
[/list]In other words, filtering is [b]client-side and personalized[/b],  each player controls what words are filtered in their own chat.

[b]Note: [/b]To be honest, Steam chat filtering is not that strong. I highly recommend 
adding custom words yourself. The best approach is to add the target language text file.
found in  [url=https://github.com/LDNOOBW/List-of-Dirty-Naughty-Obscene-and-Otherwise-Bad-Words]List of bad words[/url]﻿.

[b][size=4]

Ban System[/size][/b]

A ban system is implemented to protect the community from spam and harassment.
[list]
[*][b]Purpose:[/b] To keep the chat clean and positive for all users. (So make sure you report anyone who deserves a ban.)
[/list][b]Note:[/b] If you report someone, [b]the entire chat[/b] will be sent to the developer for review, and appropriate action will be taken.[b][size=4]


Usage:
[/size][/b][size=3]Click "T" to type. :))[/size][b][size=4]


Commands:[/size][/b][list][b]
[/b][list]
[*][b]/clear[/b] - Clears your chat history.
[*][b]/mute[/b]  - Mutes a specific player.
[*][b]/unmute[/b]  - Unmutes a specific player.
[*][b]/kick [/b] - Kicks a player from your session. (Only host)
[*][b]/profile[/b]  - Opens the player's Steam profile in your browser.
[*][b]/report[/b]  - Report a player for misconduct. (Reports should only relate to Soulschat mod, e.g. slurs and racism etc...)
[/list][/list][i]

Requires Steam to be running.[/i]
Seamless co-op is required because this mod was designed to improve the LFG experience.

name: Enhanced Dark Moon Greatsword and Wing of Astel
summary:
自动附魔并能拨挡魔法。
Always buffed and can deflect sorceries and incantations.
艾丝缇薄翼（曲剑）也获得了相似的增强。
Wing of Astel (Curved Sword) has also been modified following similar pattern.
description:
1.9.4：稍微增强了普通质变的君王军大剑与弯刃大刀。前者适合魔力伤害附魔。

           普通质变的君王军大剑的默认战技改为可以穿透盾牌防御的“[color=#ffd966]黑夜斩击[/color]”。
           普通质变的弯刃大刀的默认战技改为“[color=#ffd966]岩石剑[/color]”。

           轻微提高了蓄力的黑夜斩击的伤害，并把实际杀伤半径扩大到3米，与视觉效果更相一致。不过大部分时候还是不蓄力比较厉害。


1.9.4：Slightly enhanced the Lordsworn's Greatsword and the Falchion with the Standard affinity. The former is well-suited for magic damage enchantments.

           The default skill of Lordsworn's Greatsword with the Standard has been changed to "[color=#ffd966]Witching Hour Slash[/color]," which can penetrate shield defense.
           The default skill of Falchion with the Standard has been changed to "[color=#ffd966]Cragblade[/color]."

           Slightly increased the damage of the charged "Witching Hour Slash" and expanded its actual damage radius to 3 meters, making it more consistent with the visual effect.

[center]
[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1773430179-921263853.jpg[/img]
﻿[/center][center]﻿以大剑发动的“黑夜斩击”的物理伤害属于普通[/center][center]With a Greatsword, 'Witching Hour Slash' deals Standard physical damage[/center]


[center]-----------------------------
[size=3]以下是正文：[/size]
[size=3]The following is the main text:
[/size]-----------------------------[/center]


        暗月大剑在装备时自动获得剑气附魔，不需要发动战技“月光剑”。
        附魔如果消失或者歪了，请重新装备一下暗月大剑。

        现在暗月大剑可以像其他大剑一样使用其他战技了。当前默认战技是“王朝剑技”，可以闪躲敌人的攻势然后迅速还击。
        此外，重击剑气的射程稍微增加。

        为避免bug产生，暗月大剑不能自由选择左右手装备。这个mod尚有各种缺陷，欢迎各位大佬创作更完善的版本。

        这个mod的暗月大剑的版本分为原版伤害和纯魔法伤害。原版伤害版拥有最高的单手蓄力攻击伤害，战技和其他动作的伤害在游戏前期也很高。

        纯魔法伤害版本的冻伤值更高，蓄力重击可以拦截追踪性魔法，并且站立重击可以弹开箭矢。
        同时，这个版本把君王军大剑的模型和动作替换为暗月大剑。
        它们如同暗月大剑不同质变的分身，用于对抗魔法抗性高的boss。并让非智力加点的褪色者也能在游戏早期，用各种质变来体验暗月大剑的玩法。

        君王军大剑现在只能靠道具、魔法和祷告来附魔。作为交换，攻击力全面提高。
       [color=#efefef] 不考虑致命一击加成，在游戏后期与原版的名为大剑的大剑相比较，修改后的君王军大剑在[/color][color=#ffd966]普通、优质、火焰、雷电、魔力、焰术、神圣[/color][color=#efefef]质变上具有伤害优势。[/color]

        除此之外，在可选文件中还包含了消除魔法的版本。它的站立重击虽然不能弹开箭矢，但具备最强的拦截魔法的能力。
        为何不把暗月大剑统一做成最实用的消除魔法呢？因为把一个火球变成空气哪比得上一剑把它拍飞，再挤爆在墙上呢。

[center]
---------------------------------

[size=3]安装：把所有文件放进MOD文件夹（CSV文件除外）[/size]
[size=3]﻿INSTALLATION: [/size][size=3]PUT EVERYTHING INTO ''MOD'' FOLDER (EXCEPT .CSV FILE) 

[/size]---------------------------------[/center]

        The Darkmoon Greatsword is automatically enchanted when equipped, without using skill "Moonlight Greatsword" .
        If the buff disappears or is distorted, please re-equip the Darkmoon Greatsword.

        Now The Darkmoon Greatsword can choose skill like other greatswords. The default skill is "Dynast's Finesse", which enables the Tarnished to dodge incoming attacks and immediately counter.
        In addition, the range of the magic wave has been increased.

        To avoid bugs, the Darkmoon Greatsword cannot be freely selected for left and right hand equipment.
        This mod still has various defects, welcome everyone to create a more perfect version.



        This mod features two versions of Dark Moon Greatsword: one with vanilla damage and another dealing pure magic damage. 

        The vanilla damage version  has the highest damage for charged attacks, while the damage of skills and other actions is also high in the early game.

        The pure magic damage version has a higher frostbite buildup; its charged heavy attacks can intercept homing spell, and its standing heavy attacks can deflect arrows.

        Meanwhile, pure magic version replaces the model and moveset of all non-Standard affinities of Lordsworn's Greatsword with those of Dark Moon Greatsword.
        These variants act like alternate affinities of the Dark Moon Greatsword, intended to counter bosses with high magic resistance. They also allow Tarnished without Intelligence-focused builds to experience Dark Moon Greatsword gameplay early with various affinities.

        Lordsworn's Greatsword now can only be enchanted through items, sorceries, and incantations;  in exchange, its attack power has been significantly increased.
        [color=#efefef]Regardless of the critical hit bonus, compared with the Claymore (vanilla) in the late game, the modified Lordsworn's Greatsword has a damage advantages with [/color][color=#ffd966]Standard, Quality, Fire, Lightning, Magic, Flame art, and Sacred[/color][color=#efefef] affinities.[/color]

        Furthermore, a dispel spells version is included in the optional files. Its standing heavy attacks trade arrow deflection for the most powerful spell interception.
        Why not make the Dark Moon Greatsword uniformly adopt the most practical spell dispelling effect?
        Because how can the visual effect of turning a fireball into air compare to slamming it away with a sword and then squashing it against a wall xD



[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1763676451-1262111542.jpg[/img]
[center]
魔力质变的君王军大剑。通过不同特效的附魔与暗月大剑相区别
Lordsworn's Greatsword with Magic affinity.
It is distinguished from the Dark Moon Greatsword by its unique enchantment visual effects.[/center]

My Weapons Overhaul (Link)
---------------------------------

[/color][/url][/size]
1.0.1：只是让月光剑buff常驻，增加j剑气的射程，不包含其他修改。位于Old files顶部。

1.0.1: Only makes the Moonlight Greatsword buff permanent and increases the wave‘’s range, without any other modifications. Located at the top of Old files.



1.0.2：
     1、暗月大剑的月光剑附魔即使被替换，依然能用重击打出剑气，只是失去了魔力和冻伤的加成。

     2、因为剑气不需要战技也能常驻，现在剑气视为武器攻击的一部分。重击投射物受斧护符加成，不受葛孚雷的肖像、战士壶碎片护符增益。

     3、暗月大剑的重击的剑气可以弹开魔法投射物。

     4、蓄力重击的剑气改成类似于冻霜踏地的aoe，保持3冲不变。纯魔版的蓄力冻霜的伤害只比无蓄力剑气高一点点，但范围大幅增加。
           相比之下，不考虑装备加成，在相同时间内，未蓄力站立重击对单个敌人的输出稍微更高，包括伤害和异常积累方面。削韧效率则大致相等。

     5、暗月大剑只有剑刃部分的伤害可以受到双手剑护符加成，因为单持和双持投射的是同样的剑气，技术上很难区别对待。
           作为弥补，稍微提高了暗月大剑的跳跃轻击及所有重击在双手共持时的伤害。


1.0.2：
     1、Even when the Moonlight Sword enchantment is replaced, Dark Moon Greatsword can still projectile Sword Beams.

     2、Since the projectile wave is now permanently available (without skill), it is treated as part of the weapon's attacks.
     Charged heavy attack projectiles benefit from the Axe Talisman but are no longer boosted by Godfrey Icon or Warrior Jar Shard.

     3、Now the moonlight wave from Dark Moon Greatsword's charged and uncharged heavy attack can deflect sorceries and incantations.

     4、The charged attack's wave has been changed to an AOE similar to Hoarfrost Stomp, while retaining its damage level.
           In comparison, without factoring in equipment bonuses, the uncharged standing heavy attack offers slightly higher DPS against a single enemy.

     5、The moonlight wave can not be boosted by the Two-Handed Sword Talisman, as both one-handed and two-handed versions fire the same projectile, making it technically difficult to treat them differently.
           As compensation, the damage of the Dark Moon Greatsword's jumping light attack and all heavy attacks when two-handing the weapon has been slightly increased.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1754606188-1031286491.jpg[/img]



1.0.3：依照相同的模式修改了艾丝缇薄翼（曲剑）。
        它的站立重击消耗的精力增加，产生的剑气的射程大幅提升，并可以弹开魔法、祷告。

        与暗月大剑相比，艾斯缇薄翼的无蓄力重击剑气的伤害和冲击力更低，但动作更快，更善于拦截魔法。

        这些武器可以为百智和双月的BOSS战提供独特的体验，在拦截BOSS的法术之余还以凌厉剑气。


        Wing of Astel  (Curved Sword) has been modified following the same pattern.
        Its standing heavy attack consumes more stamina, the range of the energy wave it launches is greatly increased, and it can deflect sorceries and incantations.

        Compared to Dark Moon Greatsword, the uncharged heavy attack energy wave of Wing of Astel have lower damage and damage level, but they are released faster and more effective at intercepting spells.

        These weapons can provide a unique experience in the battle against the All-Knowing and the Twin Moons, allowing Tarnished to intercept the boss's spells while countering with sharp energy wave.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1754730385-455280007.jpg[/img]




1.04：把弯刃大刀的动作替换为艾丝缇薄翼，让非智力加点的褪色者也能在游戏早期，用各种质变来体验艾丝缇薄翼的玩法。
         弯刃大刀现在只能靠道具、魔法、祷告或者战技：夸耀咆哮、悲恸惨叫来附魔。作为交换，攻击力全面提高，特别是[color=#ffd966]优质、魔力、焰术、神圣[/color][color=#efefef]质变。
[/color]
         此外，寒冷质变的君王军大剑和弯刃大刀的伤害属性被改成纯物理，数值接近血质变。
         这样就可以和纯魔力伤害的暗月大剑、艾丝缇薄翼做出区分，在面对不同boss时发挥针对性作用。


1.0.4：The movesets of the Falchion (Curved sword) are replaced with those of Wing of Astel, allowing Tarnished who do not invest in Intelligence to experience the gameplay of Wing of Astel with various affinities earlier.
         Now Falchion can only be enchanted through items, sorceries, incantations, or the skills Braggart's Roar and Shriek of Sorrow. In exchange, its damage has been significantly improved, especially for [color=#ffd966]Quality, Magic, Flame Art, and Sacred[/color] affinities.

         Additionally, the damage type for the Lordsworn's Greatsword and Falchion with Cold affinity has been changed to pure physical, with attack power values close to those of the Blood affinity.
         This creates a distinction from the pure magic damage of the Dark Moon Greatsword and Wing of Astel, making them more effective against specific bosses.




1.1.0：艾丝缇薄翼的单手蓄力攻击能以剑气组成十字斩。
         与连续发射两次不蓄力重击的剑气相比，十字斩的异常倍率有所下降，但是精力伤害更高，冲击力提升到2，并且可以劈开法术和祷告。

         艾丝缇薄翼的连续2次不蓄力站立重击间隔非常短，动作比其他曲剑的蓄力重击更快，并且伤害和是削韧的倍率都更高。
         不过相比起蓄力重击没有2冲，推图时不能按着小怪打。原版艾丝缇的面板较低，导致威力不突出，现在面板提升后就有点强过头了。


         The one-handed charged heavy attack of the Wing of Astel now unleashes a cross-slash blade beam.
         Compared to two projectiles from consecutive uncharged heavy attack, the cross-slash has a lower status ailment correction.
         However, its stamina damage is higher, its damage level increases to 2, and it can shatter sorceries and incantations.

         Wing of Astel's two consecutive uncharged heavy attacks have a very short interval, excelling in both damage and poise damage—outperforming the charged heavy attack of other curve swords.
         Compared to a charged heavy attack, its drawback is that, without damage level 2, it cannot repeatedly stagger non-boss enemies.


[center]﻿[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1755064637-493352828.jpg[/img]﻿[/center]



1.1.1：作为可选文件，修改了艾丝缇薄翼的模型，延长到接近巨型刀。
        轻微增加了暗月大剑的模型的攻击范围（外观没变）。原版的暗月大剑比亵渎圣剑长一点，但实际攻击范围却不如后者。顺便优化了暗月大剑的附魔和轨迹的位置。（纯魔力版不需要这个）

        除此之外，准备了魂3的幽魂军刀模型，用于替换弯刃大刀。幽魂军刀不但长度优秀，外形也相当凌厉。
        感谢[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/eldenring/mods/6777?tab=files&file_id=33389]spicyfellA[/url]提供的模型。我只是校正了它的点位，使它的命中判定、附魔特效与武器外观更吻合。


1.1.1：As an optional file, the model of Wing of Astel (0419) has been extended to match the reach of a Grossmesser.
        The attack range of the Dark Moon Greatsword model has been slightly increased (appearance unchanged). In the original version, Dark Moon Greatsword was slightly longer than Blasphemous Blade, yet its actual attack range was inferior to the latter's. (This is included by default in the Pure Magic version.)

        Additionally, the model of Follower Sabre from Dark Souls 3 is provided as a replacement for the Falchion (0401).
        Follower Sabre is not only excellent in length, but also quite sharp in appearance.
        Thanks to [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/eldenring/mods/6777?tab=description]spicyfellA[/url]﻿ for the model. I only adjusted its dummy to better align the hitbox, enchantment effects, and weapon appearance.

1.2.0：艾丝缇薄翼在双手共持时，不蓄力重击可以投射出重力球，越远的敌人受到的吸力越大；
         蓄力重击可以释放出岩块刀刃一样的aoe，这片重力岩刃有几率防御魔法、祷告和箭矢。

         这些投射物可以受双手剑护符加成。不过即使不使用护符，双手共持时的站立重击伤害也会明显高于单手时的。


         When two-handing Wing of Astel, R2 heavy attacks launch Gravity Well that exert stronger pull forces on more distant enemies.
         Charged heavy attacks unleash an AoE similar to Blades of Stone.These gravitational rock spikes have a chance to deflect Sorceries and incantations.

         These projectiles can be boosted by the Two-Handed Sword Talisman. However, even without the talisman, the standing heavy attack damage when two-handing the weapon is significantly higher than when one-handing it.

1.2.2：把艾丝缇薄翼的伤害属性全部改为魔力，使它在游戏后期表现的更好。

           同时也制作了纯魔力伤害版本的暗月大剑，伤害在初期比铁制大剑高一点，后期近似亵渎圣剑。
           与原始伤害版本不同，纯魔力版本的暗月大剑自带的附魔的冻伤积累更高，但不增加魔力伤害。

           除此之外，这个版本的重击投射物能弹开箭矢。 遇到弹飞后还能继续追踪的法术时，蓄力攻击有可能直接消除该法术。

           纯魔法伤害版本的暗月大剑重击耗费的精力在单持时会比双手共持时少，蓄力重击的冰霜对近距离的敌人的伤害稍微增加。


         All damage attributes of Wing of Astel have been converted entirely to magic damage, improving its performance in the late game.

         A pure Magic Damage version of the Dark Moon Greatsword has also been created, with its damage adjusted to be on par with the Blasphemous Blade.

         Unlike the vanilla damage version, the pure magic version of the Dark Moon Greatsword's inherent enchantment provides higher frostbite buildup, but does not increase magic damage.

         Furthermore, the heavy attack projectiles of this version can deflect arrows. When encountering spells that continue tracking after being deflected, charged attacks have a chance to completely dispel them.

         The pure magic version of the Dark Moon Greatsword consumes less stamina when performing heavy attacks with one-handed wielding compared to two-handed wielding.
           Additionally, the charged heavy attack's frost damage against close-range enemies is slightly increased.





1.3.0：为应对弹开后依旧穷追不舍的火焰，创作了一个消除法术的合集版本作为可选文件。
           这个版本的暗月大剑和艾斯缇薄翼所有的站立重击都可以直接消除魔法，不过不能阻挡箭矢。
           其中，这个版本的暗月大剑的蓄力攻击的冰霜可以吸收袭来的法术和祷告，并转化为冰雾反攻敌人。


        To counter flames that relentlessly pursue even after being deflected, a collection of dispelling spells has been created as an optional file.
        In this version, all the standing heavy attack of Dark Moon Greatsword and Wing of Astel can directly dispel magic, but cannot deflect arrows.
        Additionally, the hoarfrost generated by this version of the Dark Moon Greatsword can absorb incoming sorceries and incantations, converting them into icy mist.

1.3.1：制作了艾丝缇薄翼的寒霜版，它的蓄力重击的特效被换成重力冰霜。
        它的蓄力重击投射物可以额外造成90点冻伤积累，但是异常状态倍率、附魔伤害倍率降为0。
        双手共持时的蓄力重击不能拨挡魔法，但可以让敌人滑进下一刀的攻击里。


1.3.1：A hoarfrost version of Wing of Astel has been created, where the charged heavy attack effects have been replaced with frost.
        Its charged heavy attack projectiles can additionally cause 90 points of frostbite buildup, but the status ailment correction and enchantment attack correction are reduced to 0.

        When wielded with both hands, the charged heavy attack cannot deflect spells, but it can slide enemies into the follow-up attack.

1.4.4：修改了战灰：神兽冻霜踏地。把不蓄力的版本改成萨米尔骑士常用的寒冰爆炸，类似于黄金之怒。它能快速发动，并有较高的冲击力，在被小兵围攻时会很有用；
        蓄力后的神兽冻霜踏地的攻击范围改成360度，对一般敌人可以造成两次伤害，对巨大体型的敌人造成更多。


1.4.4：Enhanced the AOW: Divine Beast Frost Stomp. 
        The uncharged version has been changed to an ice explosion commonly used by the knights of Zamor, similar to Wrath of Gold.
        It can be activated quickly and delivers high impact, making it particularly effective when surrounded by multiple enemies.
        Its charged version now has a 360-degree attack range, dealing two damage to regular enemies and more to large-sized ones.

1.5.1：把部分在游戏后期用不上的战灰替换为独特的战技：

           物品“战灰：决心”装到武器上时，战技会变成“王朝镰技”，能闪躲敌人的攻势再迅速还以颜色。装载条件为所有长柄类武器。图标改成和“战灰：幻影共击”一样。

           当物品“战灰：白影诱惑”装到武器上时，战技会变成“瞬雷之长柄斧”，能突进大段距离后伴随着雷光重击敌人。可以装载在握柄足够长的各种斧、锤、连枷、长柄武器和特大武器上。图标被改成与“战灰：瞬雷”一样。增强了战技的削精。

           物品“战灰：战吼”装到武器上时，战技会变成“角降临之风暴”，能横扫周围大片敌人，适合神圣质变。图标改成和“战灰：唤起风暴”一样。可以装载在大型武器和看起来比较长的武器上，比如轻大剑。
           角降临之风暴首次消耗的专注值-8，后续消耗的专注值+3。

           物品“战灰：辉石魔砾”装到武器上时，战技会变成“白光炸裂”，能突进大段距离并把敌人炸上天。可以装载在突刺盾，以及那些看起来足够大和直的剑与长柄武器上面。

           提升了以特大剑发动“白光突袭”时的突刺攻击的冲击力，更容易使敌人踉跄。
           稍微增大了白光突袭的爆炸范围，避免敌人被突刺击退后躲过去。


1.5.1：Replace 4 Ashes of War that become obsolete in the late game with unique skills useful for swords:

           When the AOW: Determination is equipped on a weapon, it grants the weapon the "Dynastic Sickleplay" skill, which allows tarnished to dodge enemy attacks and swiftly counterattack.
           This Ash of War can be applied to all polearm-type weapons, and its icon has been changed as the AOW: Phantom Slash.

           When the item "AOW: White Shadow's Lure" is equipped on a weapon, the weapon art changes to "Blinkbolt: Long-hafted Axe," allowing the user to lunge forward a great distance and strike the enemy with a Thunder Smash. Enhanced the stamina damage of the skill.
           It can be equipped on various axes, hammers, flails, polearms, and colossal weapons with sufficiently long hilts. Its icon has been changed as the AOW: Blinkbolt.

           Horn Calling: Storm consumes 8 less FP the first time it is used, and 3 more FP on subsequent uses.

           When the AOW: War Cry is equipped on a weapon, it grants the weapon "Horn Calling: Storm" skill, which can sweep through a large area of enemies and is suitable for Sacred affinity. The icon is changed to be the same as AOW: Stormcaller.
           It can be equipped on large weapons and those that appear relatively long, such as Light Greatswords.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8454/8454-1760741197-113594763.jpg[/img]




           When the AOW: Glintstone Pebble is equipped on a weapon, it grants the weapon "White Light Charge" skill, allowing the user to dash forward and launch enemies into the air.
           It can be equipped on thrusting shields, as well as swords and polearms that appear sufficiently large and straight.

           The damage level of thrust attacks performed with Colossal Swords using "White Light Charge" has been increased, making it easier to stagger enemies.
           Slightly increased the explosion range of White Light Charge, reducing the possibility of enemies dodging after being knocked back by the thrust attack.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8454/8454-1760741204-1582861338.jpg[/img]






1.6.0：调整了艾丝缇薄翼的战技“星云”的的散布范围，并让它像水雷一样在敌人靠近后更快爆炸，使敌人在连续的爆炸中动弹不得。相应的，战技消耗的精力稍微增加。
        平均而言，敌人在每次战技中会被多炸一次，更强调冲击力压制。
        每次爆炸的伤害和削韧与武器面板挂钩，比原版星云更低；当褪色者属性很高的时候，总伤害会比原版更高10%左右。

        为避免被武器自身的重击干扰，“星云”在开始发生爆炸后不可被驱除。

        所有版本的暗月大剑的蓄力攻击在挥剑的一刻即可拦截法术，不需要等寒霜出现。


1.6.0：Adjusted the spread area of the Wing of Astel's skill "Nebula" and made it detonate faster when enemies approach, locking them in place with a chain of explosions.Correspondingly, the stamina consumed by the skill increases slightly
        On average, enemies will be exploded 1 more time in each skill, while the damage per explosion decreases.
        To prevent interference from the weapon's own heavy attack, the "Nebula" cannot be dispelled once the explosion is initiated.

        The charged attacks of all versions of Dark Moon Greatsword can intercept spells the moment the sword is swung, without waiting for the hoarfrost to appear.

1.7.0：现在需要使用文件中附带的模型（wp_a_0617.partsbnd），才能让纯魔法伤害版的暗月大剑的“王朝剑技”正常造成伤害。
        原版伤害版的暗月大剑不会做出这些改动，以方便使用其他模型的玩家。

        纯魔法伤害版的暗月大剑在发动“王朝剑技”时，会从剑身延伸出光刃，大幅提升战技的攻击范围。

        如果发动战技时专注值不足，将不会产生光刃。


1.7.0：Now, it is necessary to install the model (wp_a_0617.partsbnd) included in the file, to ensure that the "Dynast's Finesse" of the pure magic version of Dark Moon Greatsword deals damage correctly.
        The vanilla damage version of Dark Moon Greatsword will remain unaltered to accommodate players using other models.

        When the pure magic version of Dark Moon Greatsword activates "Dynast's Finesse", it extends a blade of light from the sword, significantly increasing the skill's range.

        The blade of light consumes an small amount of Focus Points when it successfully strikes an enemy with the first thrust.
        If you're out of FP, the blade of light won't appear.

1.7.1：作为战灰修改的一部分，“王朝剑技”现在被设定为快速战技。现在它可以更快地衔接在各种动作后，就像王朝镰技、猎犬步法和翻滚一样。
        改动之后，翻滚比战技回避更快地衔接在王朝剑技第二段突刺攻击后，战技比翻滚更快地衔接在最后的二连击后。

        强化了暗月大剑版的“王朝剑技”的第一次突刺的冲击力，并在命中后消耗比原版多一点点的专注值。
        除此之外，王朝剑技的第3下横斩在命中之前更不容易被敌人打断。只要褪色者韧性够，就可以无视原本会强制砸扒或击飞的攻击，继续斩出去。
        如果没有专注值，就不会有这两项增强。


1.7.1：As a part of the modifications to Ash of War, "Dynast's Finesse" has been set as a fast weapon art.
        Now it can be executed more swiftly after various actions, similar to Dynastic Sickleplay, Bloodhound's Step, and rolling.
        After the changes, skill dodge can follow the final two-hit combo of Dynast's Finesse more quickly than rolling.

        The damage level of the first thrust of Dark Moon Greatsword's "Dynast's Finesse" has been enhanced, and upon hitting the target, it now consumes a small amount of Focus Points.
        In addition, the third attack (slash) of Dynast's Finesse is less likely to be interrupted by enemies before it hits.
        These two enhancements would not be available if you have no FP.

1.8.0：纯魔法版的暗月大剑的王朝剑技的第三击也可以延伸出光刃，增大斩击范围。同时，这一击伤害和削韧翻倍，但不造成冻伤积累。
          除此之外，它的王朝剑技第二击改为投射出冰箭（消除魔法版则是冰风），可以贯穿最多2个近距离的敌人，造成大约2倍的冻伤积累，但几乎没有伤害。
          这一系列改动是为了增加攻击范围，避免出现第一击打中而后续攻击落空的情况。

          暗月版王朝剑技的闪避消耗的精力不再因武器精力消耗倍率而增加，相当于-1耗精。稍微减少了第三击消耗的精力。


1.8.0：The third attack of Dynast's Finesse of the pure magic version Dark Moon Greatsword can also extend a blade of light, increasing the range of the slash. Simultaneously, this attack doubles damage and poise damage, but does not cause frostbite buildup.

         Additionally, the second attack of its Dynast's Finesse has been altered to launch an ice arrow (or a frost gust in the dispel spells version) that pierces up to two nearby enemies, dealing nearly double frostbite buildup but practically no damage.

          Slightly reduced the stamina consumption of the dodge and the third hit for Dynast's Finesse of Dark Moon.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1764143778-1213839776.jpg[/img]


[center]王朝剑技第二击-消除魔法版
2nd attack of Dynast's Finesse - dispel spells version[/center]

[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1764870745-717391236.jpg[/img]

[center]第三击
3rd attack[/center]


1.8.1：现在雷电和火焰质变的君王军大剑、弯刃大刀改为受到智力或信仰加成，加成值接近神圣质变。

          赋予了君王军大剑的自带的附魔更独特的外观，根据质变的不同而产生变化，如同月光剑和各种附魔的结合。
          不同的自带附魔造成的冻伤积累都是相同的55点。

          优质、厚重、锋利质变的君王军大剑在被施加新的附魔后，自带的附魔的月光剑视觉特效依然会保留。


1.8.1：Now, the Lightning and Fire affinities of the Lordsworn's Greatsword and Falchion (Curved sword) have been modified to scale with Intelligence or Faith, with a scaling value close to that of the Sacred affinity.

          The inherent enchantment of the Lordsworn's Greatsword has been given a more unique visual appearance, which changes based on the type of affinity, resembling a combination of the Moonlight Greatsword and various enchantments.
          Different inherent enchantments all share the same frostbite buildup of 55 points.

          For the Lordsworn's Greatsword with Quality, Heavy, or Keen affinities, the Moonlight Greatsword visual effect of its inherent enchantment will still remain after applying a new enchantment.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1763676434-1208586039.jpg[/img]

[center]雷电质变
lightning affinity[/center]

[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1763696537-1752270726.jpg[/img]﻿

[center]厚重质变+火附魔
Heavy affinity + fire enchantment[/center]

[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1763955464-1680342935.jpg[/img]




1.9.0：暗月大剑可以引爆敌人身上的寒气。
          当后撤轻击、奔跑重击、跳重击、防御反击、骑马蓄力重击命中冻伤状态的敌人后，会消耗少量专注值，造成无视防御的额外伤害，并让冻伤提前结束。
          稍微增加了暗月大剑与艾斯缇薄翼的后撤轻击的伤害，使它大于翻滚轻击。

          纯魔力版的暗月大剑的冻伤值会随武器强化而提升，伤害也随之调整。


1.9.0：The Dark Moon Greatsword can detonate the frostbite on enemies.
          When a backstep light attack, dash heavy attack, jumping heavy attack, guard counter, or horsing charged heavy attack hits a frostbitten enemy, it consumes a small amount of FP, deals extra defense-ignoring damage, and ends the frostbite status prematurely.

          Slightly increased the damage of the backstep light attack for both Dark Moon Greatsword and Wing of Astel, making it greater than the rolling attack.

          For the pure magic version of Dark Moon Greatsword, its frostbite buildup increases as the weapon is upgraded, and its damage has been adjusted accordingly.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1765087453-1782111448.jpg[/img]﻿


[center]如果敌人体型很大，引爆寒气的特效会不明显。
If the enemy is very large, the visual effect of detonating frostbite may be less noticeable.[/center]



1.9.1：取消对失乡骑士大剑的修改。取而代之的是，把普通质变以外的君王军大剑的模型和动作替换为了暗月大剑，并稍微提高了伤害。
          神秘质变的君王军大剑现在改为物理与雷电混合伤害，使它与附魔特效更相称。
          它的物理与雷电伤害都受灵巧与感应两个属性加成。受感应加成的赤红雷电代表了龙的力量。


1.9.1：Revert all modifications to the Banished Knight's Greatsword.
          Instead, the model and movesets of the Lordsworn's Greatsword—aside from its Standard affinity—have been replaced with those of the Dark Moon Greatsword, and its damage has been slightly increased.

          The Lordsworn's Greatsword with Occult affinity, now deals combined physical and lightning damage. This makes it more compatible with its enchantment effects.
          Both its physical and lightning damage scale with Dexterity and Arcane. The crimson lightning, empowered by Arcane, represents the power of dragons.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1765669773-74270678.jpg[/img]




1.9.2：把regulation.bin文件升级到游戏版本1.16.1。
          稍微增加了弯刃大刀的站立重击、蓄力重击造成的神圣、雷电、火焰伤害，使混伤质变的伤害不低于血质变。
          根据质变的不同，弯刃大刀的剑气和重力球在命中后会适用不同属性的特效。不过人形敌人被焰术剑气击中后会被烧的摇头晃脑，看起来有点怪。


1.9.2：Update the regulation.bin file to game version 1.16.1. 
[center][/center]          Slightly increased the Fire/Lightning/Holy damage dealt by the Falchion's standing heavy attack and charged heavy attack.




1.9.4：稍微增强了普通质变的君王军大剑与弯刃大刀。前者适合魔力伤害附魔。

           普通质变的君王军大剑的默认战技改为可以穿透盾牌防御的“[color=#ffd966]黑夜斩击[/color]”。
           普通质变的弯刃大刀的默认战技改为“[color=#ffd966]岩石剑[/color]”。

           轻微提高了蓄力的黑夜斩击的伤害，并把实际杀伤半径扩大到3米，与视觉效果更相一致。不过大部分时候还是不蓄力比较厉害。


1.9.4：Slightly enhanced the Lordsworn's Greatsword and the Falchion with the Standard affinity. The former is well-suited for magic damage enchantments.

           The default skill of Lordsworn's Greatsword with the Standard has been changed to "[color=#ffd966]Witching Hour Slash[/color]," which can penetrate shield defense.
           The default skill of Falchion with the Standard has been changed to "[color=#ffd966]Cragblade[/color]."

           Slightly increased the damage of the charged "Witching Hour Slash" and expanded its actual damage radius to 3 meters, making it more consistent with the visual effect.


[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/4333/images/8329/8329-1773430179-921263853.jpg[/img]

[center]﻿﻿以大剑发动的“黑夜斩击”的物理伤害属于普通﻿
With a Greatsword, 'Witching Hour Slash' deals Standard physical damage[/center]

name: Unreal ReShade
summary: Cinematic ReShade that remasters Elden Ring with Unreal Engine 5 visuals.
description:

DETAILS[/u][/b]
[/size][list]

[*][size=3]realistic color correction[/size]

[*][size=3]reduced vignette[/size]
[*][size=3]& more[/size]
[/list][size=3]

[b][u]INSTRUCTIONS[/u][/b]
[/size][list=1]
[*][size=3]Download and unzip the attached file.[/size]
[*][size=3]Move contents (2 files + 1 folder) into [b]\common\ELDEN RING\Game[/b].[/size]
[*][size=3]Open Elden Ring, press Home to open the ReShade panel, then select [b]\Game\reshade-shaders\Unreal.ini[/b].[/size]
[*][color=#e06666][size=3]If "Unreal.ini" appears extremely bright for you, select "Unreal (brightness fix).ini" instead.[/size][/color]
[*][size=3]Toggle filter by pressing End, or bind a preferred key in the panel.[/size]
[*][size=3]Enjoy![/size]
[/list][size=3]

[b][u]NOTES[/u][/b][/size][list=1]
[*][size=3]Works online! I've used this online for 700+ hrs with no issues or bans.[/size]
[*][size=3]No need to install ReShade beforehand. This comes with ReShade build 6.7.1 (released 1/18/2026).[/size]
[*][size=3]If you can't move your mouse cursor to another monitor, use Borderless Windowed and open menu/map.[/size]
[*][size=3]The "Unreal.ini" presets are recommended for [i][u]Elden Ring[/u][/i] / [i][u]Dark Souls 3[/u][/i] / [i][u]Sekiro[/u][/i].[/size]
[*][size=3]The "Lite.ini" preset is recommended for [i][u]Cyberpunk[/u][/i] / [i][u]Expedition 33[/u][/i] / [i][u]Lies of P[/u][/i].[/size]
[/list][size=3]

author: alvnq

name: Elden Ring Tainted Edition Overhaul (ERTE)
summary: Overall game overhaul, focused on combat gameplay, leveling progression balance, and difficulty.
description:
[size=3][b][color=#00ff00]COMPATIBLE WITH ER SOTE 1.16.1[/color][/b]

[b]Overall Mod Site (WIP)[/b]

[url=https://sites.google.com/view/elden-ring-tarnisheds-edition/init?authuser=0]ERTE Website (work in progress)[/url]

[b]Discord Server (Changelog channel there)[/b]

[url=http://discord.gg/3gMmNGfKWu]ERTE Discord[/url]


[/size][size=3][b]Intro
[/b]
ERTE mod was initially designed to create a more challenging experience for [b]coop play. It can also be played solo[/b] [b]but[/b] [b]only if you are both a very skilled and a patient player[/b]. Be warned, if you go solo, [b]it can be very frustrating at first if you dont invest some time into learning the new meta[/b]. Both enemies density and enemies hp pools have been heavily increased, and the scaling is flattened to end game level, so you have to find ways to overcome the combat challenges using the game tools at your disposal. If you find yourself hitting a wall, you most probably are not using the proper damage type against the enemies faced. You have to use a combination of weapons with different damage types. Use your brain.

[b][color=#ff0000]New Optional Lite Version[/color][/b]

I am aware many players want to play ERTE solo to try new weapons and bosses in a relaxed way, and they cant cope with the increased enemy count and choke points designed for coop play, so I released a [b]Lite version without map edits other than the areas with new bosses[/b]. Scaling is still flattened, so players damage output goes from x1 up to roughly x2, but enemies hp is decreased x0.6 from regular ERTE values. Think in this like a "baby mode" ERTE.

You can find this lite version in optional download files section.

Note: For now, [b]SOTE areas are edited same as ERTE regular version[/b]. Im still hesitating about making them vanilla or not (the edits are more tamed there).

[b]Main Features
[/b]
- [b]Combat is more lenient[/b], you are allowed to cancel attacks earlier, and most attacks have been sped up.

[img]https://i.imgur.com/cRP5xVP.gif[/img]

- [b]Perfect Block[/b] is active from the get go for all weapons.[/size][size=3]

[img]https://i.imgur.com/LLLF2r4.gif[/img]

- [b]Perfect Release[/b] added to R2 charged attacks and bows/crossbows.

[img]https://i.imgur.com/90IBaB0.gif[/img]
 
- [b]New game difficulty balance[/b]. Scaling has been revamped and flattened. You can no longer break difficulty overleveling, no matter the route you choose. Instead of the ridiculous up to x7 scaling vanilla has, ERTE players damage and enemies hp goes up to x2 maximum. This means [b]you still can, and need to, increase your total AR leveling up both your stats and your weapon[/b]. Forget about killing bosses with a pair of hits.

- [b]Many new weapons[/b], either ported from other Souls games (mainly DS3) or being completely new. Theres also a few new armors, and spells.

[img]https://i.imgur.com/I2ASum3.png[/img]

[img]https://i.imgur.com/ckPmJ2G.png[/img]
 
- [b]New enemies and bosses[/b], Nightlords and DS3 ones, ported from Nightreign.

[img]https://i.imgur.com/8tuNRuV.png[/img]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/JgIspoT.png[/img] [img]https://i.imgur.com/qYr0HoY.png[/img]

- [b]New starting classes[/b].

[img]https://i.imgur.com/TOaZijW.png[/img]
[b] [/b]
[b]Installation[/b]

- You need Mod Engine 3 to run ERTE mod. [b]Download Mod Engine 3[/b] from Github from here [url=https://github.com/garyttierney/me3/releases/download/v0.10.1/me3_installer.exe]ME3[/url] and install it first.

- Go to Mod Engine 3 installed folders and [b]find: … > me3 > config[/b]

- Unpack ERTE SOTE zip file and [b]put the ERTE > profile main folder there[/b], merging with existing one.


That is all. Run the provided ERTE-SOTE-CoopReady.me3 profile file to launch the mod.

If you  want to play SeamlessCoop with ERTE, download it, and install it inside:

… > me3 > config > profiles > eldenring-mods > ERTE SOTE > @dll mods

Seamless Coop provides a config file that allows to adjust enemies and bosses HP pools and posture break resistance. If playing coop, I suggest to set regular enemies HP to x1.5 and bosses to 1.0, and dont change posture break resistance values. But thats up to you.


[b]Run provided Gideon shortcut to add new weapons icons[/b]

Right before running the mod, use the Gideon app shortcut provided inside > ERTE SOTE folder to run [b]Gideon [/b]software. It will add new description icons to the game automatically. Otherwise description icons will be blank.


[b]Credits[/b]

Many thanks to all those people that made the tools and gathered all the info that allows to mod this game. You all people rock.
Many thanks also to [b]Kaimod [/b]for his contributions with hks edits and [b]EtheriusZT [/b]for new weapons models, and [b]spicyFella [/b]for his permissions to use all his DS3 weapon models. Also many thanks to [b]Kirnifr [/b]and [b]Ivi [/b]for the inspirational features in their Elden Ring Reforged mod, and [b]Clevererraptor [/b]and [b]FWang[/b] for their help, and [b]Blubber [/b]for his fantastic job with the retargeted animations, and [b]FloppyDonuts [/b]for all his help and enemies ported into ER.[/size]
author: BelgerMod

name: Seamless Co-op (Elden Ring) - Traduzione italiana
summary: Traduzione italiana della famosa mod Seamless Co-op di Yui.
description:
[size=4][b]Traduzione italiana della mod "Seamless Co-op" di Yui
[/b][/size][size=3]La mod originale è ovviamente un requisito. Terrò la mod aggiornata.[/size][size=3]
Non preoccupatevi se non ricevete una notifica per una nuova versione della traduzione, caricherò nuovi file solo se necessario, altrimenti mi limiterò a cambiare il numero della versione.[/size][size=4]

author: Loreciao

name: Seamless Co-op - Spanish Translation
summary: Traducción al Español (España y Latino) de Seamless Co-op
description:
La versión mas reciente de Seamless Co-op no viene con archivos de traducción, solo con el texto en Ingles.
Los archivos de traducción anteriores (como los de la ver. 1.9.0) funcionan casi en su totalidad, pero requerían ligeros ajustes para ser 100% compatibles con la más reciente actualización.

Ademas, se hicieron ligeros cambios/modificaciones a ciertas lineas de texto para acoplarlas mas con los textos originales del juego.

La instalación es simple, basta con descargar el archivo locale.rar y descomprimir el contenido en [font=Courier New][b]SeamlessCoop/locale
[/b][/font]Y eso es todo, ahora el mod tendrá todos sus textos en Español.

Si notan algún problema, por favor hagan el reporte y tratare de corregirlo lo antes posible.
EDIT: Actualizado a la versión 1.9.6 y añadido Español España
author: Ge Os

name: DMN - Deflect Me Not
summary: Deflect attacks with Sekiro's animations, cancel actions, custom movesets, custom timing for attacks and more...
description:
[size=3]Version [b]3.0[/b] is here!

[left][u][b][size=5]***** NOTES *****[/size][/b][/u][/left]- You can change all [b]options [/b]easily by modifying the file "[b][color=#e06666]c0000.hks[/color][/b]" in "[b]action/script/[/b]".
- Supported mods:
﻿[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/eldenring/mods/2202]Elden Ring Reborn[/url]
﻿[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/eldenring/mods/3419?tab=files]The Convergence[/url]
﻿[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/eldenring/mods/5964]McKenyu's Moveset Modpack[/url]
﻿[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/eldenring/mods/1928]Clever's Moveset Modpack[/url]
[/size][size=3]
- DMN Discord server (I'm not very active here :D!)
[url=https://discord.gg/W3KhfCANed] ﻿https://discord.gg/W3KhfCANed[/url]


[/size][size=5][u][b]FEATURES[/b][/u][/size][size=3]
[center]

[youtube]0TjQwYOwcmQ[/youtube]


[youtube]J-Bii6nE-F4[/youtube]﻿[/center]    > Deflect enemy attacks.
+ Nullify all [b]damage[/b] and [b]stamina[/b] consumption
+ Buff [b]guard counter[/b] damage for a short time after a successful deflect.
+ Buff [b]all attacks[/b] for a short time, after a number of perfect deflect.
+ Deal [b]poise[/b] damage and [b]HP[/b] damage on perfect deflect.
+ Trigger an [b]escape action[/b] (turn back, roll or jump) when being attack from [b]behind[/b].

    > Cancel attacks and actions.
+ Press [b]guard/roll/jump[/b] buttons to cancel [b]all attacks[/b] and [b]some actions[/b].
+ Holding jump button to jump in the air and access to location where normally you cannot.
+ Switching mode with [b]L1+L2[/b].

    > Custom timing for attacks.
+ Can increase/decrease timing for [b]next attack[/b] in the combo.
+ Only support [b]Right-Hand[/b] weapons.
+ Supported attacks are: R1 combo, R2 combo, R1 Dash, R2 Dash, R1 jump, R2 jump, R1 backstep, R1 roll.
+ Switching mode with [b]R1+R2[/b].

    > Custom movesets.
+ Define your own combo with supported attacks.
+ Only support [b]Right-Hand[/b] weapons.
+ Supported attacks are: R1 combo, R2 combo, R1 Dash, R2 Dash, R1 jump, R2 jump, R1 backstep, R1 roll.
+ Switch mode with [b]R1+R2[/b].

    > Upgrade AoWs with different attacks.
+ In current version ([b]EXP4[/b]), I have added [b]3 level[/b] of charging for [b]Mighty Shot[/b] and [b]6 new attacks[/b] for R1 and R2.
+ You can press L2 to charge and R1/R2 to attack with new arts.
+ Press R1/R2 before LV1 charging to use a normal Mighty Shot attack.
+ R1 arts: [b]Unlimited Blade Works[/b] LV1, LV2 and LV3.
+ R2 arts: [b]Piercing Arrow[/b], [b]Shattering Arrow[/b] and [b]Explosion Sphere[/b].

    > Custom movement.
+ Sprint with [b]left-stick[/b] only. No need to [b]hold [/b]sprint button.
+ Custom movement speed, jump height, rolling distance and backstep distance.

    > Regen HP, FP and Stamina.
+ Select the values that suit your need.
+ More fun with FP regen.

    > Item Disccovery, Equipment Load and Arrow Distance.
+ Some personal modification for people with less time playing.
[/size]


[size=5][u][b]INSTALLATION[/b][/u][/size][size=3]
[b]
[u]Note 1[/u][/b][u]:[/u]
This mod will modify "[b]regulation.bin[/b]" and "[b]action/script/c0000.hks[/b]". Any other mods that contains the same files will not compatible with this mod. Please [b]merge[/b] these two files if you want to use them together. I have added new effects in [b]AtkParam_Pc[/b], [b]Bullets[/b], [b]BehaviourParam_PC[/b], [b]SpEffectParam[/b] and [b]SpEffectVfxParam[/b], ID from [b]60000+[/b]. Or, you can simply type "[b][DMN][/b]" in the searchbox.

[u][b]Note 2[/b]:[/u]
If you use a supported version for other mod (Map for Goblins, for example), please place this mod [b]above[/b] them in the configuration file.


[center][youtube]_UC78BJ_yW8[/youtube][/center]

To use this mod, you will need:
    > [url=https://github.com/soulsmods/ModEngine2/releases]Mod Engine 2﻿[/url]


[/size][size=4][b]1. Install Mod Engine 2[/b][/size][size=3]
- Download it from: [url=https://github.com/soulsmods/ModEngine2/releases]https://github.com/soulsmods/ModEngine2/releases[/url]
- Extract and copy content of ZIP file to your <game folder>. (Ex: Game\Elden Ring\)
- Open file "[b]launchmod_eldenring.bat[/b]" and add your game path.
[i]
From:
.\modengine2_launcher.exe -t er -c .\config_eldenring.toml

To:
.\modengine2_launcher.exe -t er -c .\config_eldenring.toml --game-path ".\\eldenring.exe"[/i]

- Run "[b]launchmod_eldenring.bat[/b]" to play your game.[/size][size=3]


[/size][size=4][b]2. Add DMN to Mod Engine 2[/b][/size][size=3]
- Download this mod.
- Extract and copy content of ZIP file to <Game folder>\mod. (Ex: Game\Elden Ring\mod\)
- Open "[b]config_eldenring.toml[/b]" and modify.

- For [b]Elden Ring[/b] without other mods:[i]
{ enabled = true, name = "[b]DMN-Vanilla[/b]", path = "mod\\DMN\\[b]DMN-Vanilla[/b]" }[/i]

- For other supported mods. This is an example for Map of Goblins.[i]
{ enabled = true, name = "[b]DMN-MapOfGoblins[/b]", path = "mod\\DMN\\[b]DMN-MapOfGoblins[/b]" },
{ enabled = true, name = "[b]ER-MapOfGoblins[/b]", path = "mod\\[b]ER-MapOfGoblins[/b]" }[/i]


[size=5][u][b]CREDITS[/b][/u][/size][size=3]
[/size]Blubber - Player Animation Repositories Collection
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/eldenring/mods/3027]https://www.nexusmods.com/eldenring/mods/3027[/url]

You can support me on Ko-Fi :)!

author: TomJT20

name: Ascendio III - FPS Hotfix and Engine Tweaks for Hogwarts Legacy
summary: Ascendio is an unofficial FPS hotfix for Hogwarts Legacy, a performance boost mod for Hogwarts Legacy: it applies Unreal Engine parameters to help address some of the game's performance issues.
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/WpUBzeb.png[/img]﻿
[img]https://i.imgur.com/7mzWUdY.png[/img]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1805][img]https://i.imgur.com/21nFJxr.png[/img][/url]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/ThR255z.png[/img]
[center][/center][center][size=5]· M O D   D E S C R I P T I O N ·[/size][/center]
Ascendio is an unofficial performance hotfix for Hogwarts Legacy developed by Seifu.
The Ascendio Project (currently) includes the following hotfixes:

[list]
[*]FPS Hotfix which aims to help with Hogwarts Legacy's stuttering issues, it also provides a 10% performance gain thanks to the changes made to the game's culling behavior, CPU to GPU co-computing and VRAM management, among other fixes. 
[color=#444444]|[/color][*]The Ray Tracing Hotfix enhances ray tracing performance (precise statistics not available yet, sorry) and improves the quality of the effects. This is achieved by upscaling the source image, implementing UE4 filtering and denoising functions, introducing performance optimizations like priority-based culling and material thresholds, and enabling UE4 experimental quick ray cast based on material thresholds, among other fixes.
[color=#444444]|[/color][*]FSR3 Frame Generation overwrite for DLSS-G using Nukem9's implementation. This is a compatibility fix for the FPS and RT Hotfix to function seamlessly with Nukem9's FSR3. It is essential because FSR3 Frame Generation is an asynchronous task that places a workload on the GPU VRAM, a process managed by Ascendio's FPS and RT hotfixes. It also offers a hassle-free, user-friendly quick install for FrameGen.
[color=#444444]|[/color][*]Fine-Tune is a quick graphics auto-tune based on Kizaru's Steam guide. Fine-Tune will choose an optimized graphics setting for your system based on graphics impact/performance impact. It's recommended to install this to avoid VRAM based crashes.
[/list]
Please be aware that this is an unofficial hotfix, not a form of black magic. Some performance issues in Hogwarts Legacy stem from backend bugs and core function issues, which ideally should be addressed by the developers in the editor. Therefore, while the mod can be effective, it doesn't resolve all stuttering problems, only the majority of them.

Additionally, it's important to note that the FPS Hotfix may cause texture parsing delays the first time you load your save, lasting a few seconds. You might encounter texture delays at specific moments during your playthrough, but these instances should be resolved in just 2 to 3 seconds.
These delays occur when your GPU is inundated with entry requests. Without the implemented functions, this could lead to stuttering or even crashes. To prevent such issues, the mod instructs your system to calmly compute everything asynchronously while the game is running.

[quote][center][b][color=#f6b26b]﻿W A R N I N G[/color][/b][/center]
Ascendio is a Work In Progress unofficial hotfix and [b][color=#f6b26b]it does not work on all systems[/color][/b].
It achieves the fps boost and stuttering fix by enabling a lot of features which are very hardware dependant and are not present on all systems.

The list of compatible setups will hopefully grow bigger with time as I keep iterating this project. Please do understand that I do not own a game-testing lab, so I don't know if it will work on your specific setup. Feel free to install the mod and try if it works: it's free, so if it doesn't work you can always uninstall it.

Thanks for your understanding and sorry for the inconveniences.[/quote]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/OZEhR6f.png[/img]

[center][size=5]﻿· H O W   T O   I N S T A L L / U N I N S T A L L ·[/size][/center][list=1]
[quote][*][size=3]Launch the game for the first time if you haven't already for it to generate the config files Ascendio is supposed to tweak.[/size]
[*][size=3]Then you can just extract and run the installer! It's the file called "Ascendio III Installer", you'll find it inside the provided .zip file.[/size]
[*][size=3]You'll﻿ find both the installation and uninstallation buttons on the application's first page.[/size]
[/quote][/list][color=#f6b26b][ ! ] Keep in mind that FSR3 FMF overwrites DLSS Frame Gen in-game, which is only usable when turning on DLSS image scaling. This means you'll need an Nvidia GPU capable of enabling DLSS image scaling in order to use FSR3 Frame Generation.[/color]

Ascendio utilizes a cross-platform open-source installer developed by me, known as SIA | Public.

Please note that SIA is a non-signed software that modifies (Hogwarts Legacy's) .ini and .dll files. Your AV may get a little nervous about that. Feel free to temporarily turn it off during the installation process if you encounter any issues.

Also, remember that both Ascendio and SIA source codes are available on GitHub as open source projects. Check out the files tab for the url.

[img]https://i.imgur.com/7mzWUdY.png[/img]﻿
[center][size=5]· S U P P O R T   M Y   W O R K ·[/size][/center]
I invest numerous hours perfecting these exceptionally polished mods, time that could be dedicated to freelance requests. However, I genuinely enjoy creating mods for my favorite games and sharing them for free. Any form of support is immensely appreciated!

Occasionally, I release Work In Progress (W.I.P.) versions of my mods for free on my Patreon, and I also provide status updates (not free) detailing the progress of my developments and their anticipated availability. So, even if you don't plan on spending money on Patreon, do check my page from time to time! :')

[center][url=https://www.patreon.com/seifu][img]https://i.imgur.com/Q5PzWkH.png[/img][/url]﻿[/center]
author: Seifu

name: Blueprint Apparate Modloader
summary: Allows loading of blueprint mods without requiring a DLL hook. Can load a user-defined list of logic mods, meant to alleviate the problem of logic mods overwriting each other.
description:
This mod loader will add a menu that you can open with the F1 key, you can add logic mods with this menu and your list of mods will be saved
and automatically loaded every time the level is loaded in.

[b][u]Installation:[/u][/b]
Install by dropping the [b]zBPApparate_P.pak, [/b][b]zBPApparate_P.ucas, and zBPApparate_P.utoc[/b] files in your "...\Hogwarts Legacy\Phoenix\Content\Paks\~mods" folder.  If you do not have a ~mods folder, create one.

﻿This comes with no built-in mods, this is just a way for mod authors and users to use multiple logic mods without them overwriting and conflicting with each other, and without the need for a DLL.

[b][u]How to use(users):[/u][/b]
To use the menu press the [b]F8 [/b]key, and a menu should open up.
With this menu opened you can click in the uppermost white box to enter a mod name and press enter to load the mod.

To exit the menu simply click out of the text box and hit F8 again.

[b][u]Changing Hotkey:[/u][/b]
To change the Hotkey used to open BP Apparate in game, navigate to your Engine.ini file (for Steam this is located in "\Users\Username\AppData\Local\Hogwarts Legacy\Saved\Config\WindowsNoEditor\Engine.ini").
Add the following text with your desired key selected:

[code][/Game/CustomContent/ModloaderAssets/FloatingModloaderMainWidget.FloatingModloaderMainWidget_C]
MenuKey=F7
[/code]
Note that number keys and numpad keys must be spelled out (e.g., Zero; NumPadZero).  However the "F" keys are basic (e.g., F7).

[b][u]Known Issues:
[/u][/b]Certain mods may not load (pressing Enter will not clear the entered text).  This means that the blueprint mod has a conflict or is not loading, it is not related to BP Apparate directly.  Try renaming the blueprint mod files to start with ! or ~


[b][u]How to use(modders):
[/u][/b]The mod loader simply loads up custom map instances, and those maps must be placed in this specific UE4 project path;
"/Content/CustomContent/", for example "/Content/CustomContent/MyMod.umap"
Inside that newly created map, Blueprints -> Open Level Blueprint (at the top), and create your logic there or spawn your own blueprint and continue from there.[b][u]
[/u][/b]Pak your level and any related assets, and once in-game just open the mod menu (F8) and type in your mod name (umap name).

Instructions for making BP Apparate-compatible mods can be found here (it's easy): [url=https://github.com/Stray-Modding/StrayModdingWiki#modloader-tutorial-largely-copied-from-the-kh3-modloader-instructions]ModLoader Mod Creation[/url]
[i](the guide was made for Stray but the same principles apply)[/i]

Make sure you package your mod with IO Store turned on. See: https://github.com/narknon/CCFF7RUproj#to-pak-files-as-ucasutoc

[b][u]Credits:[/u][/b]
This mod loader is heavily based on YuriLewd from KH3's mod loader.
author: Narknon

name: Hogwarts Mod Merger
summary:
Standalone Utility to combine and edit mods, enabling previously incompatible mods to work together.
Currently able to merge mods that use PhoenixShipData.sqlite and English localization strings.
description:
[b][color=#cc4125][size=4][center][color=#93c47d][size=5][img]https://i.imgur.com/F8cgPxn.png[/img]﻿﻿﻿[/size][/color][color=#93c47d]
Merge multiple mod files together, allowing conflicting mods to work together
[/color][/center] [/size][/color][center][size=2][color=#cc4125][color=#999999]
Currently only works for mods that Modify ﻿[/color][/color][color=#e06666][i]PhoenixShipData.sqlite and Main-enUS.bin[/i][/color][/size][/center][/b][center][color=#999999][b][size=2]More options including .ini merging is coming soon[/size][/b][/color][/center][b][i]
[/i][/b]
[b]Note: Every Game Update that modifies the [b][color=#ff0000][color=#e69138]PhoenixShipData.[color=#ff0000][color=#e69138]sqlite [/color][/color][/color][/color]file will render all mods that modify this file out of date![/b][/b]
[b]
Mod authors will need to update/re-create their mods to incorporate these changes.[/b][list]
[*]If you want a shortcut, you can run your mod through the merger by itself to semi-intelligently patch it to make them compatible again.
[/list][b]Outdated mods can still be merged and will be smartly filtered to patch out and breaking changes.
[/b][list]
[*]
[/list][color=#999999][b][size=2]
[color=#00ff00][size=3]***NEW*** version 0.14 and 0.15[/size][/color][/size][/b][/color][list]
[*]Supports Hogwarts Legacy January 2025 Update
[*]Rewrote the Mod Patcher logic to be smarter and simpler; [i]all[/i] outdated mods (including those built against the original Feb 2023 game version) should now be mergeable without breaking anything majorly. From 0.15 - this also works for [b]English[/b] localization files too
[*]Added Game Version selector: You can now choose which game version you want to merge mods for! You can technically use this feature to merge features from new mods into older versions of the game, but you're on your own if you try this. The main reason for adding this ability is a lot of people are downgrading their games to avoid the latest patch which broke a lot of third party mods.
[/list]
Some mods that can be merged with this tool (Many many more can also be merged):
[list]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/131]Avada Kedavra Faster Cast[/url]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/84]Alohomora Mod[/url]﻿
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/98]Vivarium Upgrado (Rescue all Animals)[/url]﻿
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/163]Conjure Anything[/url]﻿
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/232]Consistent Basic Cast[/url]﻿
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/238]No Cooldowns[/url]﻿
[/list]


[b][size=3][color=#00ff00]Instructions:[/color][/size][/b]
[list=1]
[*]Download Hogwarts Mod Merger.zip and extract to a folder of your preference
[*]Run Hogwarts Mod Merger
[*]Choose a Game Version - if your exact version cannot be found, choose the version closest to yours that is OLDER. e.g. if your game is version 1145800, choose version 1130773 in the list.
[*]Click "[b]Add[/b]" and find the .pak file/s for the mods you want to add.
﻿Note: Not all mods can be merged in this way; the tool will notify you if this is the case.
[*]A preview of the changes will show up in the table on the right, under the respective tab. Most mods will only modify the Phoenix Database, some will modify both Phoenix and Localization strings.
[*]Repeat Step 3 for any other mods you want to add. [color=#f1c232][b]Mods higher on the list will override lower mods if there are conflicts, so the order you add them matters! You can right-click to promote or demote a mod to change its priority.[/b][/color]
[*][b]Optional:[/b] Select each mod in the left list in turn, and right-click to edit or delete the entry. For Localization strings, you instead double-click the value box to edit
[*]Click [b]"Preview Merged Changes"[/b]: This will show all the game changes that will be written to a new mod file on the right. [b]This will remove any duplicate entries by default if two mods make the exact same change.[/b] Lines can be edited/deleted from this preview as in Step 6.
[*]Click "[b]Build Merged Mod[/b]".
[*]The output folder will open. Copy the created "[b]zMergedMods_P.pak[/b]"[b] [/b]file to your [color=#a4c2f4][b]~mods[/b][/color] folder (Should be in [color=#a4c2f4][b]HogwartsLegacy/Phoenix/Content/Paks/~mods[/b][/color]). You can rename the mod whatever you want. [color=#f1c232]It should also be [b]at the bottom of your mod list! Add as many "z"s to the start of the mod name to ensure this. [/b][/color]
[*][color=#f1c232][b]Variable: [/b][color=#ffffff]You should be able to delete the individual mods and only keep the merged one - [i]however[/i], if a mod changes more than just the PhoenixShipData.sqlite or language files, this will break them - in this case, keep [i]both[/i] the merged mod and the original mod[/color][b][color=#ffffff]. You will have to play around with the mod order to make sure they work properly[/color][/b][/color]

[/list]

[b][size=3][color=#00ff00]Planned Features (In progress):[/color][/size]
[/b][list]
[*]For mods that clash with each other (for example, two mods that both want to change the cooldown of [i]Avada Kedavra[/i]), allow you to choose which mod has priority and/or manually edit the selected change to whatever you want.
[*]Allow merging mods that change control schemes and keybindings, or any ".ini" changes in general.
[*]Easily make your own mods that modify the database (contains many variables in the game, including cooldowns, unlocked waypoints, challenges, inventory slots, money, health, magic, duelling combos, etc.). I'll release this as a separate tool to avoid bogging this one down too much
[/list]

[color=#00ff00]
[/color][b][color=#00ff00][size=3]For Mod Makers:[/size][/color]
[/b]If bundling more than PhoenixShipData.sqlite and localization files, please consider splitting these two into a separate pak from the rest of your mod to make it easier for merging :) e.g. Multimod_Mergable.pak and Multimod_NotMergeable.pak to allow merging of parts of the mod that can be merged without breaking the rest.
author: Iridium IO

name: Character Editor
summary:
Easily edit both your character presets and your wand on the fly !

31th January 2025 update compatible.
description:
[b][size=4]CharacterEditor has been ported to the new modding kit.
Here is the new project page : [url=https://www.curseforge.com/hogwarts-legacy/mods/character-editor]https://www.curseforge.com/hogwarts-legacy/mods/character-editor[/url]
It's now available via the in-game mods menu  ![/size]

[size=5]Description[/size][/b]

Character Editor adds a UI to edit your character at any point in your game.
All changes are made [u]live[/u] and are [u]saved[/u] to your character.
It also unlocks options that were not available in the original character creator. 
Fully compatible with mods that change appearance.

[b][size=3]Character editable options :
[/size][/b]
[list]
[*]Firstname and lastname
[*]Social heritage (restored feature)
[*]House
[*]Body type
[*]Dormitory
[*]Voice
[*]Face
[*]Skin color
[*]Hairstyle 
[*]Hair color
[*]Eye color
[*]Eyeliner (restored feature)
[*]Eyeshadow (restored feature)
[*]Eyebrow shape
[*]Eyebrow color
[*]Lipstick (restored feature)
[*]Blush (restored feature)
[*]Freckles and moles
[*]Complexion
[*]Scars
[*]Make Up style (restored feature beware that option 1 turn off Eyeliner, Eyeshadow, Lipstick and Blush)
[/list]
Also make available hidden presets from the original character creator (means more hair style ect...).

[b][size=3]Wand editable options :[/size][/b]

[list]
[*]Style
[*]Color
[*]Wood type
[*]Lenght
[*]Flexibility
[*]Core
[/list]
[b][u][size=5]How to install
[/size][/u][/b]
[list=1]
[*]Install [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/56]Blueprint Apparate Modloader[/url]
[*]Drop archive files in folder in C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Hogwarts Legacy\Phoenix\Content\Paks\~mods
[*]Press F8 in game and type "CharacterEditor" then press enter
[*][b]Press F5 to display the character editor[/b] (Press F5 or escape to close).
[*][b][i]On the start of new save, you need to progress until you get to Hogwards for the mod menu to display[/i][/b]
[*][i]Need help to install ? -> read[b] [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/974/?tab=forum&topic_id=12709878]Installation guide[/url]﻿ [/b][/i]
[/list][b]
Mod window is draggable, click on the top bar.
[/b]
[b]Change hotkey :
[/b]- After mod was loaded in game -> Quit game -> Hotkey can be modified in C:\Users\username\AppData\Local\Hogwarts Legacy\Saved\Config\WindowsNoEditor\Input.ini -> search entry "CharacterLiveEditor" -> change key

[b][u][size=5]Informations[/size][/u][/b]

[i]This mod use chunk id 159.
[/i]
Custom preset/wand thumbnail images (~ 350) have been made by [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/users/74753383]integral89[/url]. 

Big thanks to [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/users/74753383]integral89[/url] for those wonderful cheat sheet images, testing and design advice :)
Thanks to [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/users/7945765?tab=user+files]Meatbag101[/url] for testing, feedback and graphic asset rework.

[i]Preview of future updates will be shown on the modding [url=https://discord.gg/D9XU8pjuZe]discord[/url] ([url=https://discord.com/channels/1067453475631419412/1081923777413251163]discord channel[/url]).
[/i]
My other mods:
[i][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/2125]Class System[/url][/i]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/2029]PhotoMode Enhanced[/url]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1786]Azkaban[/url]
[b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1748]NightCurfew[/url][/b]
[url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1442]EmoteWithAnyNpc[/url]

author: nathdev

name: Ultra Plus Best Performance and Visuals for Everyone
summary: Ultra+ is a series of mods designed for all PCs, fixing bugs and performance, with the best possible visuals.
description:
[b]Only download Ultra+ mods from Nexus or Ultra Place Discord. We do not upload anywhere else.[/b]

[size=5][b]What is Ultra+?[/b][/size]
Ultra+ provides comprehensive engine tuning, visual enhancements, and performance balancing to maximize your game experience for as many ranges of hardware as possible.

[b]Support:[/b] All support is provided via Discord. We do not provide support on Nexus. There are many people willing to help in Discord.
[b]Updates:[/b] Mod updates are provided first via UPM and Discord. Nexus is often out of date.
[b]Feature Requests:[/b] Feel free to request features in Discord. We can modify most things in UE games now including some game asset modifications.

[url=https://theultraplace.com]Ultra+ Documentation[/url] | [url=https://discord.gg/ultraplace]Discord[/url] | [url=https://theultraplace.com/Support]Support U+[/url]
[url=https://theultraplace.com/games/hogwarts/]View full documentation on the website[/url]

----------------------------------------

[size=5][b]Quick Start[/b][/size]

[list]
[*] Install using [b][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/site/mods/1586]Ultra+ Manager (UPM)[/url][/b] (recommended) or manual installation
[*] Configure settings using UPM or edit config files
[*] Press F12 in-game to apply settings (disable Steam screenshots if conflicting or change the Apply Settings keybind in UPM)
[*] Load presets: apply [font=Courier New]uplus_defaults[/font] then a quality preset (low/medium/high/veryhigh/epic)
[*] Check game-specific tips below for detailed information
[/list]

[b]Manual Installation:[/b] Extract the mod files to your game directory.

[color=#ff7700][b]Important:[/b][/color] Do not use Engine.ini mods with Ultra+ as they will likely cause crashes or visual issues. Ultra+ already includes comprehensive engine optimizations.

[url=https://theultraplace.com/installation]Full Installation Guide[/url] | [url=https://theultraplace.com/configuration]Configuration Guide[/url]

----------------------------------------
[size=5][b]Overview[/b][/size]

U+ for Hogwarts Legacy is an end to end overhaul with significant focus on improving Raytracing visuals and performance. It includes custom RT systems and tuned color grading presets.

[size=5][b]Game Tips[/b][/size]

[list]
[*] For RT Skylight to function correctly, dynamic lighting must be enabled. If you experience instability then disable dynamic lighting and RT skylight.
[*] RT Skylight can be very expensive
[*] Dynamic lighting also fixes certain visual bugs in specific game locations and changes RT settings depending on player location and action (such as flying)
[*] [b]For most stable experience[/b] - disable dynamic lighting, RT skylight, and RTAllOfTheLights
[/list][list]
[*]Recommend RTAO
[*] If you want the best possible visuals, revert the game to the version prior to the release of mod tools. All newer versions have decreased visual quality.
[/list][b]Denoising modes[/b]
[list]
[*] none - disables reflection denoisers, most temporally stable reflections and best visually, but has specular noise and white spots - prefers lower reflection smoothness
[*] no_rr_1 - uses UE reflection denoiser, more stable that no_rr_2, some specular noise, some instability
[*] no_rr_2 - uses RT spatial reflection denoiser, least stable temporally but has the least specular and white spot noise
[*] ray reconstruction - nvidia only, most stable, tends to blur image - [b]use RR preset E[/b] - this can be configured via NVPI (NVIDIA profile inspector) - it must be done [i]per game[/i] instead of globally. The default preset will be noisy.
[/list]

[size=5][b]Configuration[/b][/size]

[b]AutoApplyConfig[/b] - [font=Courier New]off,on[/font]
automatically reload settings when config changes - primarily to be used with the UPM overlay

[b]Bloom[/b] - [font=Courier New]game/0-3[/font]
Bloom intensity (0.0 = off, 1.0 = default, 2.0 = double, game = use game default)

[b]ChromaticAberration[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,on[/font]
Recommend disabling in most games as it often just blurs the image for no benefit

[b]ContactShadows[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,flickery,floaty[/font]
by default game has flickery contact shadows, this is distracting, alternative is to make the contact shadows more floaty

[b]DebugLogging[/b] - [font=Courier New]off,on[/font]
enable verbose debug logging to UE4SS console - use ALT+D to toggle at runtime

[b]Denoising[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,none,no_rr_1,no_rr_2,rayreconstruction[/font] [F10]
Controls denoising method. none=raw reflections (specular but sharp), no_rr_1=standard denoising, no_rr_2=spatial filtering only, rayreconstruction=DLSS Ray Reconstruction. Use RTShadowQuality to control shadow/AO sample counts.

[b]DepthOfField[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,on,on_less_blurry[/font]
depth of field control - off reduces noise in cutscenes

[b]DynamicLighting[/b] - [font=Courier New]off,on[/font] [F5]
required for RT skylight - controls skylight parameters based on 430 tuned locations, modifies RT radius based on location, turns off certain features in some game locations, increases RT settings when flying

[b]EnableKeybinds[/b] - [font=Courier New]off,on[/font]
Enables individual setting keybinds if they are available, does not change global keybinds

[b]Fog[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,on[/font] [F7]
Turns fog on or off, if on_with_lumen is provided then it allows enabling fog in lumen space (GI and reflections)

[b]LODBias[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,minuspoint5,minus1,minus1point5,minus2[/font]
Forces textures to be higher resolution, -0.5 is the safest, more can cause frequency patterns to appear, some games benefit from more than others

[b]LODDistanceScale[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,high,veryhigh,epic,ultra,insane[/font]
Draw static meshes and foliage at higher quality further away

[b]LightDrawDistance[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,x1_0,x1_5,x2_0,x2_5,x3_0[/font]
light draw distance scale

[b]LightingMode[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,ssao,ssgi,rtao,gtao[/font] [F4]
game/ssao/ssgi/rtao/gtao

[b]LightingPreset[/b] - [font=Courier New]vanilla,vanillatweaked,realism,fantasy,harys,fairytale,darkmoor[/font] [F3]
vanillatweaked/realism/fantasy/harys/fairytale/darkmoor/vanilla

[b]MotionBlur[/b] - [font=Courier New]game/0-1[/font]
U+ improves motion blur quality in every game by default, recommend a small amount of blur ~0.2

[b]RTAllOfTheLights[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,on_high,on_epic[/font]
force all light sources to cast shadows and RT shadows, on epic increases the limit of max RT shadowed lights

[b]RTShadowQuality[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,veryhigh,epic[/font]
RT shadow and AO samples per pixel. Ignored when Denoising=rayreconstruction (RR uses 1 sample)

[b]RTSkyLight[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,on[/font] [F8]
Raytraced skylight - ray reconstruction is required

[b]RTWater[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,on[/font] [F9]
Raytraced water

[b]ReflectionSmoothness[/b] - [font=Courier New]game/0.0-2.0[/font]
Reflection smoothness (0.0-2.0, vanilla = 1.5, default = 1.0) - different values may be better with different denoising, for example no denoising with 0.4

[b]Sharpness[/b] - [font=Courier New]game/0-1[/font]
Control UE tonemapper sharpness - recommend setting this to 0 and using RCAS through reshade

[b]VSync[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,on[/font]
allow forcing vsync - helps latency in some games

[b]ViewDistanceScale[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,one,two,three,four[/font]
increases view distance scale, affects foliage most noticeably

[b]Vignette[/b] - [font=Courier New]game,off,on[/font]
vignette effect control

[color=#ffaa44][size=5][b]In-game Settings[/b][/size][/color]

[b]Important[/b]: Choose your texture quality based on your GPU memory. Go to Graphics Settings > Texture Quality, and choose:
[list]
[*][size=3][b]4GB [/b]vram —> Choose [b]Low[/b][/size]
[*][size=3][b]6GB [/b]vram —> Choose [b]Medium[/b][/size]
[*][size=3][b]8-10GB[/b] vram —> use [b]High[/b][/size]
[*][size=3][b]12GB+[/b] vram —> use [b]Ultra[/b][/size]
[/list][size=3][u] ﻿[/u](Note: Texture Quality doesn't make a big difference to how Ultra+ looks. You can play even with 4GB vram!)[/size]

[color=#ffaa44][size=4][b]Raytracing[/b][/size][/color]
[size=3][u][b]High [/b]performance impact — [b]3080/4070/7700xt[/b] and above should be fine with [b]Ultra[/b][/u]
[/size][list]
[*][b][size=3]Ultra [/size][size=2]     [/size][/b][size=3][b]  [/b]Detailed RT reflections (much improved from vanilla)[/size]
[size=3]                Highest quality RTAO, RTGI, and RT shadows
                Ray traced particle FX (spells, etc.)[/size][*][b][size=3]High     [/size][size=2]  [/size][/b][size=3][b] [/b]Same as Ultra but [/size][size=3]no ray traced particle FX[/size]
[*][size=3][b]Med        [/b]Performance RT reflections (much improved from vanilla)[/size]
[*][b][size=3]Low   [/size][size=2]  [/size][/b][size=3][b]    [/b]Performance RT reflections[/size]
[size=3]                RT shadows only around the player (50 metres)
[/size][/list][size=3]
[/size][color=#ffaa44][size=4][b]View Distance[/b][/size][/color]
[size=3][u][b]High [/b]impact — For [b]3080/3090/4070/4080/7800xt[/b] we recommend [b]High[/b]
[/u][i]Affects vegetation, grass, and building draw distances[/i]
[/size][list]
[*][size=3][b]Ultra       [/b]2.5x view distance, however FPS cost is much more reasonable with v10 due to faster methods[/size]
[*][size=3][b]High       [/b]1.3 to 2x view-distance[/size]
[*][size=3][b]Med[/b]    [/size][size=2]   [/size][size=3][b] [/b]1.0x [/size][size=3](vanilla) view distance[/size]
[*][size=3][b]Low        [/b]0.7x performance view distance, with extra optimisations in v10[/size]
[/list][size=3]
[/size][color=#ffaa44][size=4][b]Effects[/b][/size][/color]
[size=3][u]Medium Impact
[/u]Increases or reduces the quality of:
[/size][list]
[*][size=3]Screen space reflection quality (water and reflective/shiny surfaces)[/size]
[*][size=3]Particle effects quality (including fire and spells)[/size]
[*][size=3]Fog resolution is increased or reduced (it's not super noticeable)[/size]
[/list][size=3]
[/size][color=#ffaa44][size=4][b]Foliage[/b][/size][/color]
[size=3][u][b]High[/b] impact — For [b][u]3080/3090/4070/4080/7800xt[/u][/b] we recommend [b]High[/b][/u]
Controls density and stop distance of grass and foliage (which is also affected by View Distance)
[/size][list]
[*][size=3][b]Ultra       [/b]Similar to cut-scenes but faster, with a much farther draw distance[/size]
[*][size=3][b]High       [/b]Similar to Vanilla Ultra but with performance improvements[/size]

[/list]
[color=#ffaa44][size=4][b]Sky[/b][/size][/color]
[size=3][u]Low impact

[size=5][b]Troubleshooting[/b][/size]

[list]
[*] If the general guide does not resolve your issue then refer to this section
[*] Hogwarts has shaders located in C:\ProgramData\Hogwarts Legacy - when clearing shaders make sure to clear these too
[*] If your in-game menu is suddenly missing settings try clearing your config files located at [font=Courier New]%LOCALAPPDATA%\Hogwarts Legacy\Saved\Config\WindowsNoEditor[/font]
[*] When resetting the game or launching for the first time, you may need to go into the graphics options and toggle RT settings off and back on followed by restarting the game to properly enable RT
[/list]

[size=5][b]General Tips[/b][/size]
[list]
[*] [url=https://theultraplace.com/performance]Performance & Upscaling Guide[/url] - Optimization tips, upscaling, sharpening, FPS monitoring
[*] [url=https://theultraplace.com/hdr_setup]HDR Setup Guide[/url] - RenoDX and HDR configuration
[/list]

[size=5][b]UE4SS[/b][/size]
[list]
[*] All of our UE games, unless specified as pak only, utilize UE4SS which can be found at [url=https://github.com/UE4SS-RE/RE-UE4SS]UE4SS[/url]
[*] UE4SS is prepackaged with our mods
[*] We typically ship with recent experimental latest builds and rely on some newer UE4SS features
[*] Users manually installing must sort out UE4SS installation themselves if you have an existing install
[*] Installing with UPM has a "I manage my own UE4SS" checkbox that will prevent installing any UE4SS related files
[/list]

author: VTLI

name: Hogwarts Legacy Save Game Editor
summary: Save Game Editor with GUI
description:
First version of a basic GUI for modifying Hogwarts Legacy save games. It also includes some tools for extracting the SQLite databases, so they can be modified externally and then repacked into a new save game.

This is an alpha release, so there are likely bugs. 

Features:

[list]
[*]Modify Resources (You must have at least one).
[*]Modify Combat Resources (You must have at least one).
[*]Modify Talent Points
[*]Delete Talents
[*]Modify Mission Item Counts
[*]Change Player Name
[*]Change Player House
[*]Change Base Inventory Size
[*]Modify Exp
[*]Granular control over lock states.
[*]Unlock All Fast Travel Points
[*]Unlock All Transfiguration Recipes
[*]Unlock All Spells
[*]Unlock All Gear
[*]Unlock All Gear Traits
[*]Modify Offense & Defense Stat of Gear in inventory.
[*]Extract SQLite databases from file.
[*]Create save file from SQLite files.
[/list]
Installation:
﻿This is a web application that runs inside your browser. Simply unzip the file, and open the hlse.html in your browser.

Usage:
[list]
[*]Open the hlse.html file with a browser (Double clicking it will usually work).
[*]Select the Save File input box on the left side of the screen, and choose the save file you wish to modify.
[*]If it is a valid save file the screen on the left will change.
[*]Use the tabs on the left to modify player data, resources and etc for the save game. 
[*]Once you have finished making the changes select the Save File tab on the left of the screen.
[*]Select the download button in the first tab. This will create the modified save game, which you can replace with the original save game. 
[/list]

[b]IMPORTANT[/b]: The other options "Database" and "Custom DB upload" are for advanced save game editing, you don't need to use these. Just click the first Download button on the Save File tab, and you will get a save game file with the modifications you made in the other parts of the GUI. 

[b]NOTE TO ADVANCED USERS:[/b] There was a bug in the previous version that wouldn't correctly build the save file with the new SQLite DB is you added to many new records to one of the tables. This would exhibit as the save game refusing to load. [b]Anyway this bug has been fixed, so feel free to play around with more advanced changes to the DB.[/b]

[b]Warnings[/b]:
[list]
[*]I'm not sure how the game will react to changing your house long term, but otherwise it works as expected. 
[*]I'm not sure if modifying missions items works as expected. The count definitely goes up, but not sure if the quests respect it. 
[*]I've only tested this with the newest version of Chrome, using other browsers might not work.
[*]The game has hard coded limits for things like number of health potions, be careful if you go over the amount.
[*]Backup all saves! 
[*]Backup all saves!
[/list]
