name: Brighter Eyes
summary: Changes the player eye colors to make them more vibrant. Glowing and natural options added.
description:
[size=5]Overview

[/size][size=3]Changes the default player eye colors and eye diffuse map to make the eyes look clearer and brighter.
[color=#e06666]
[/color][/size][size=3][size=5][size=4][color=#e06666]!! Download only one main file for each gender !![/color]
Brighter Eyes [b]or[/b] Even Brighter Eyes [b]or[/b] Natural Eyes [b]or[/b] Glowing Eyes.[/size][/size]
You can mix and match. [b]Example:[/b] Brighter Eyes - Female and Natural Eyes - Male.

More Blues will replace the first 10 eye colors with shades of deep blue. Will work with everything [u]except[/u] Glowing Eyes.
[/size]

[size=5]Installation[size=4]
[/size][/size]
﻿[size=3]1. Download the files for the gender you want.
[/size][size=3] ﻿2. Extract the archives with Winrar.
[/size][size=3] ﻿3. Put [u]all three[/u] files from each archive in:[/size][code]﻿\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Hogwarts Legacy\Phoenix\Content\Paks\~mods
[/code] ﻿[size=5][size=3]You can create the ~mods folder if you do not have it.
[/size]
About Glowing Eyes
[size=3]Glowing eyes will appear very bright in character creator and some scenes because of lightning settings. They are more defined in game. You can try disabling or lowering bloom if it looks wrong.
[/size][img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/5113/images/1058/1058-1678913816-1458027125.png[/img]
[/size][size=2][b]From top to bottom:[/b] eye color 12, eye color 21, eye color 25[/size]
[size=5]
Compatibility

[size=3]This mod will not work with any mods that change the default diffuse map for all eyes.
Glowing eyes may look janky with custom pupil shapes from [size=3][url=http://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1093]Unique Player Eye Shapes[/url][/size] but they work.
This mod may affect NPCs that share the same eye assets as player.
The female file uses pakchunk 152 and the male file uses pakchunk 153.
Optional texture file uses pakchunk 151.

[size=5]Recommended Mods[/size][/size][/size]

[list]
[*][size=3][url=http://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/974]Character Editor[/url]﻿ by nathdev[/size]
[*][size=3][size=3][size=3][url=http://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1078]Natural Complexions[/url]﻿ by wakingsea for skin color used in female characters from Glowing Eyes preview[/size][/size][/size]
[*][size=3][url=http://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/766]Male Face Improvements[/url]﻿ (preset 7) for the face preset used in header image[/size]
[*][size=3][url=http://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1093]Unique Player Eye Shapes[/url]﻿ for additional pupil shapes (blind, cat etc)[/size]
[/list]

name: Recoded Movies (1.95 gb instead of 10.44 gb)
summary: This mod compresses game video cutscenes, which in original form take up 10,44 gigabytes. Thanks to this mod, the movies folder will be compressed 5 times smaller to 1,95 gigabytes.
description:
This mod is created for saving disk space, primarily for those who play on small SSDs or HDDs, steam deck or other portable consoles. In general, where every gigabyte is important. My goal is to compress video files so that they are as small as possible while still maintaining the original quality. Without changing the video resolution or frames per second.

Re-encoded campaign cutscenes, tutorials, portraits, seasons transitions, credits.

In some videos the visual flaws is slightly noticeable. If you prefer max quality, then refuse to download this mod. I made this for myself and decided to share it with those who are not satisfied with a huge bloated files.

According to my tests, after deleting the following files:

pakchunk0optional-WindowsNoEditor.pak
pakchunk0optional-WindowsNoEditor.ucas
pakchunk0optional-WindowsNoEditor.utoc
pakchunk10optional-WindowsNoEditor.pak
pakchunk10optional-WindowsNoEditor.ucas
pakchunk10optional-WindowsNoEditor.utoc

The game runs without any issues or errors. They are located in: [i]example[/i] C:/Program Files (x86)/Steam/steamapps/common/Hogwarts Legacy/Phoenix/Content/Paks
You can delete or backup them and free up 25 gigabytes.
If after this you observe any errors, then revert from the backup or verify integrity of the game files through steam or epic games and download them again.

After the deletion pakchunk optional files and applying my compressed videos mod, instead of 73 gigabytes, my game folder now takes up 39,3 gigabytes (for the option 1 version) or 42 gigabytes (for the option 2 version).

[b]Installation:[/b]
Backup Movies folder in Phoenix/Content/Movies, in case you decide to revert back.

[b]Option 1[/b]
For the english, german, french, italian, latin american spanish, castilian spanish, brazilian portuguese and japanese audio language:
Unzip Option 1. Recoded Movies (Multi8).zip to the root game folder, with overwrite.

[b]Option 2[/b]
For the russian gamesvoice audio language:
Unzip Option 2. Recoded Movies (GamesVoice RUS Version).zip to the root game folder, with overwrite.

If you have problems with download, or you wanna faster download, use this pixeldrain mirrors:
[url=https://pixeldrain.com/u/3neDMX8P]Option 1 (multi8)[/url]
[url=https://pixeldrain.com/u/Yf6viVKT]Option 2 (rus)[/url]

author: Lucio69

name: Ultimate Engine Tweaks (Anti-Stutters - More Performance - Lower Latency - Better Clarity - Lossless)
summary: Definitive Unreal "Engine.ini" changes with the goal to remove most stutters, improve performance and stability, decrease input latency, improve picture clarity. All with no visual loss.
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/Fcx6Cjz.jpeg[/img]

[b][size=6][center][font=Lucida Sans Unicode]Hogwarts Legacy - Ultimate Engine Tweaks[/font][/center][/size][/b]
After over [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/P40L0X/mods]1 year of iterative work[/url] with 40+ other UE games, I would like to share my definitive, optimized, custom "Engine.ini" for the game.

My goal was to just include as many optimizations as possible (both for CPU/GPU/RAM/SSD) in order to remove most stuttering, improve performance, reduce input latency and improve picture clarity (e.g. by optimizing Film Grain, Motion Blur & removing Chromatic Aberration, optimizing DLSS/FSR Upscaling and Anti-Aliasing, reducing ghosting and shimmering) all without any visual loss nor introducing glitches or crashes.

If you want to know [u]exactly[/u] what every single optimization does and what their combined result is, have a look [url=https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1A71Q9jd0sm0MaCRWib8SJEY_urNk-Wuyl2pK5UI_4DI/edit?usp=sharing]here[/url]


[b]What to choose between the "VRR" and "No VRR" mod variants?[/b]
VRR stands for [url=https://www.rtings.com/tv/tests/motion/variable-refresh-rate]Variable Refresh Rate[/url]﻿, which can translate to G-Sync for NVIDIA or AMD Freesync for AMD.
You need to cross check if it is enabled both on your NVIDIA/AMD Control Panel and the Display itself (Monitor/TV)
If yes on both, use the "VRR" variant of the mod.
If no, use the "No VRR" variant instead.

Open the game at least once and close it, then you can directly download/extract my [b]Engine.ini[/b] to paste/replace in:

[center][i][quote]"%localappdata%\Hogwarts Legacy\Saved\Config\WindowsNoEditor"[/quote][/i]
(Press Win + R , type the path above and click Enter to open the folder directly)

then Right-Click on it -> Properties -> make sure the "[b]Read-Only[/b]" box is selected -> Apply/OK


[b](To Uninstall just delete the modded Engine.ini, the game will use its defaults on next launch)[/b]


[u]
DO NOT USE TOGETHER WITH OTHERS "OPTIMIZATION" MODS
[/u](any other mod will be compatible)




For additional PC/Windows optimizations, I also highly recommend to follow and apply my:

[url=https://www.patreon.com/posts/88124101]PC Gaming: Optimized - The Ultimate Guide (including NVIDIA/AMD CP + G-Sync/Freesync + HDR Best Settings)[/url][list]
[/list]

[size=3]
All of this is [b]FREE[/b] but, if you found it useful and want to support my work, please consider to:[/size]

author: P40L0

name: Immersive ModPack
summary: Makes the game really come alive! (By combining and significantly improving my Immersive Meals, Immersive Classes, Immersive Common Rooms and Immersive Hogsmeade mods.)
description:
[color=#00ff00][size=5]Versions[/size][/color]

See the "Changelogs" dropdown just above and the [color=#00ff00]New or Improved Features[/color] section below.

Use v0.14 of [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/178]Hogwarts Mod Merger[/url] to merge this mod with any other SQL mods you have, [u]and select the game version closest to the game version you're running[/u]. If you select a game version that's very different to the version you're running the resultant [color=#00ffff]zMergedMods.pak[/color] file will crash your game at startup.

[color=#00ff00][size=5]Description[/size][/color]

I've taken things as far as I can with the modular approach to my Immersive series of mods. Sadly it isn't practical to implement further improvements via modules. All future development will take place via this Immersive ModPack, which combines my [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1912]Immersive Meals[/url], [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1913]Immersive Classes[/url], [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1966]Immersive Common Rooms[/url] and [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/2144]Immersive Hogsmeade[/url] mods into one (and implements lots of improvements). This mod [u]is not compatible[/u] with those prior Immersion mods, so [u]they must all be deleted[/u] before you install this one. This mod is also [u]not compatible[/u] with [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/907]NPC Schedule Enhanced (Better AI)[/url]﻿ by Khione. You must also delete the changes that those mods made to your [color=#00ffff]zMergedMods.pak[/color] file (by recreating it without those mods) before incorporating the SQL .pak file from this mod.

[u]NOTE[/u]: This mod will not activate until the 1st round of Crossed Wands has been completed.

[color=#00ff00][size=5]Memory Requirements and random Crashes[/size][/color]

Moving all the named-NPC's around can use up a lot of RAM and/or VRAM. If you have a low spec system (less than 32GB RAM or 12GB VRAM) you might run out of memory. If that happens the game should switch to using virtual memory, but it has a habit of simply crashing instead. If you find that this mod crashes your PC it's probably because you don't have enough memory.

[color=#00ff00][size=5]Requirements - this is IMPORTANT!
[/size][/color]
This mod requires the following other mods to be installed:

[list]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1761]Time Dilator[/url]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1442]Emote with any npc[/url]﻿ - [u]IS NO LONGER REQUIRED![/u] In fact, if you have it installed you [u]MUST[/u]:
[/list][list=1]
[*][u]Delete[/u] [color=#00ffff]EmoteWithAnyNpc_LevelFix_P.utoc[/color], [color=#00ffff]EmoteWithAnyNpc_LevelFix_P.ucas[/color], and [color=#00ffff]EmoteWithAnyNpc_LevelFix_P.pak[/color] from your [color=#ffff00]~mods[/color] folder.
[*][u]Delete[/u] [color=#00ffff]EmoteWithAnyNPC_SleepInBed_P.utoc[/color], [color=#00ffff]EmoteWithAnyNPC_SleepInBed_P.ucas[/color], and [color=#00ffff]EmoteWithAnyNPC_SleepInBed_P.pak[/color] from your [color=#ffff00]~mods[/color] folder.
[/list]Time Dilator is required because by default one game-day passes in 48 real-world minutes. In other words time in the game passes 30X faster than time in the real world. This is a problem, because it can easily take 2 real-world minutes for Students or Professors to travel from one part of the castle to another. In game-time that's 2 x 30 = 60 in-game minutes! There is no way to create a realistic daily schedule if it takes an hour to travel from one class to another, or an hour to get to the Great Hall for lunch and an hour to get back. It is therefore [u]essential[/u] that you install the Time Dilator mod and use it to set one game-day = 3.2 real-world hours (or more, though 3 will probably do). That way it will take 15 in-game minutes (or less) to walk from one side of the castle to another, which is more workable. [u]This mod will not work correctly unless you install Time Dilator.[/u]

[color=#00ff00][size=5]New or Improved Features[/size][/color]

[list]
[*]v1.3.4) Fixed: A bug which caused an erroneous "Time Dilator is missing" message.
[/list][list]

[/list][list]
[*]v1.1.5) Fixed: Locks missing from some shops.

[*]v1.1.5) [u]Note[/u]: The [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1581]Skip Alohomora[/url]﻿ mod doesn't work on night-time locks. Dunno why. Install [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/2272]Skip Alohomora Open All Locks III[/url]﻿ instead.
[/list][list]
[*]v1.1.4) New: Professors and Staff (except Kogawa and Scriven) now sleep in their own beds at night.

[/list][list]
[*]v1.1.0) New: Named-NPC's now sit down for meals in the Great Hall.

[*]v1.1.0) Fixed: Charms Class (two-person desks now seat two).

[/list][list]
[*]v1.0.0) New: Hogwarts Express passes through Hogsmeade at approx 10am, 3pm and 9pm every day.

[*]v1.0.0) New: Added three new NPC's [only previously used in cutscenes]: 1) Constance Dagworth, a 5th year Ravenclaw. Possibly related to the Dagworth-Grangers and hence a distant ancestor of Hermione Granger. 2) Gertrude Wigley, a 1st year Ravenclaw with bows in her hair, and 3) Priscilla Wakefield, a 5th year Slytherin who is very chatty. All 33 of the game's named-NPC students now attend classes (when not on a quest).
[/list][color=#00ff00][size=5]Installation[/size][/color]

I would recommend installing the mod manually as described below. You [i]should[/i] be able to install the mod automatically using Vortex if you like (then skip to step 4 below), but Vortex can be a bit unreliable with Hogwarts Legacy mods (it doesn't always delete mods properly) so beware!

[list=1]
[*]Download the mod.
[*]Unzip the contents.
[*]Move [u]all four mod files[/u] files to the [color=#ffff00]Steam\steamapps\common\Hogwarts Legacy\Phoenix\Content\Paks\~mods\[/color] folder. (If the [color=#ffff00]~mods[/color] folder doesn't exist, create it. Also note that the [color=#ffff00]~[/color] in the name is important! It tells Unreal Engine to give the mods inside that folder a higher priority. Without the [color=#ffff00]~[/color] they get a lower priority and may not work.)
[*]Install [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/56]Blueprint Apparate Modloader[/url] if you haven't already.
[*]Install [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1761]Time Dilator[/url]﻿ if you haven't already.
[*]Start Hogwarts Legacy
[*]Load your most recent save-file.
[*]Press the [font=Courier New][color=#ff7700]F8[/color][/font] key to activate [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/56]Blueprint Apparate Modloader[/url].
[*]Type [color=#00ffff]ImmersiveModPack[/color] (that's "Pack" not "Pak") in the little window and hit the [color=#00ffff]Enter[/color] key on your keyboard.
[*]The word [color=#00ffff]ImmersiveModPack[/color] should disappear and reappear lower down in that window with an [color=#00ffff]X[/color] next to it. If it doesn't - if it stays on the top line - then either a) you put the mod files in the wrong folder, or b) one of your existing mods is already using pakchunk 2105. Use my [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1437]PakChunk Checker[/url]﻿ to check that. If you have a pakchunk conflict see the Conflicts section below.
[*]Type [color=#00ffff]TimeDilator[/color] into the modloader and hit [color=#00ffff]Enter[/color]. (Unless you've done this already.)
[*]Press [font=Courier New][color=#ff7700]F8[/color][/font] again to close the modloader window.
[*]Use the appropriate Time Dilator keybinds to set 1 game day = [i]at least[/i] 3 real-world hours. Using default keybinds, you would simply hit [font=Courier New][color=#ff7700]ALT-NUMPAD2[/color][/font] twice. That's it. Job done.
[/list]Note that you only need to follow the above process once. After that the mod will just work. But see the [color=#00ff00]Conflicts and Mergers[/color] section below.

[color=#00ff00][size=5]How to Un-Install[/size][/color]

If you installed manually, just delete the four ImmersiveModPack files from the "[color=#ffff00]Hogwarts Legacy\Phoenix\Content\Paks\~mods\[/color]" folder.

If you installed using Vortex, hit the "Remove" button on the mod inside Vortex... BUT afterwards ALSO check the folder "[color=#ffff00]Hogwarts Legacy\Phoenix\Content\Paks\~mods\[/color]" to make sure there are no folders called something like "XXX-ImmersiveModPack_v?_?_?" (where XXX is a three-letter prefix which depends on how many mods you have installed). If such a folder exists, delete it. Vortex should have deleted it but sometimes doesn't. If that folder is still there, the mod is still installed.

[color=#00ff00][size=5]Conflicts and Mergers[/size][/color]

This mod uses pakchunk 2105. You can check if that conflicts with any of your existing mods by running my [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1437]PakChunk Checker[/url]﻿ batch script after you've installed this mod. If it does conflict, you can fix it using the [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1155]Chunk ID Conflict Manager[/url].

This mod includes an SQL .pak file which alters and replaces the game's [color=#00ffff]PhoenixShipData.sqlite[/color] SQL database file. That .pak file will need to be merged with any other SQL .pak files you happen to have using [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/178]Hogwarts Mod Merger[/url]. If you're not sure which .pak files need to be merged, install and run the [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1441]Mod Merger Checker[/url].

This mod is [u]not compatible[/u] with [u]any[/u] of the following:

[list]
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1912]Immersive Meals[/url]﻿ by me.
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1913]Immersive Classes[/url]﻿ by me.
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1966]Immersive Common Rooms[/url]﻿ by me.
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/2144]Immersive Hogsmeade[/url]﻿ by me.
[*][url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/907]NPC Schedule Enhanced (Better AI)[/url]﻿ by Khione.
[/list][color=#00ff00][size=5]Known Issues[/size][/color]

Below is a list of known issues. If you encounter any others please let me know in the POSTS section.

[list]
[*]If you uninstall the mod during night-time the night-time locks will remain and you may be unable to unlock some of them. If that happens, re-install the mod, wait for daytime (the locks will disappear) then save, exit the game and uninstall again.
[*]The [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/1581]Skip Alohomora[/url]﻿ mod doesn't work on the new locks. Dunno why. Install [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/hogwartslegacy/mods/2272]Skip Alohomora Open All Locks III[/url]﻿﻿﻿ instead.
[*]If you skip time (using the Map's "Wait" function or a Time Skip mod) the scheduler can get confused and take a while to correct itself.
[*]Sometimes the named-NPC's spawn in a bunch and do nothing for a while. This is a game bug.
[*]When NPC's sit down at a table, they sometimes walk [i]through[/i] the table. This is a game bug.
[*]When NPC's eat, the plate of food sometimes fails to spawn. This is a game bug.
[*]When NPC's drink, the contents of their tankard sometimes floats in the air. This is a game bug.
[*]When some NPC's drink they seem to pour the liquid into their eyes instead of their mouth. This is a game bug.
[*]Sometimes the professors literally climb the walls in the Three Broomsticks. This is a game bug.
[*]Sometimes when NPC's in bed aggro on you they float above the bed. This is a game bug.
[*]Sometimes NPC's get stuck when walking around and "treadmill" on the spot. This is a game bug.
[*]Some beds are never used. That's because there aren't enough NPC's to fill them all. But more NPC's would require too much RAM.
[*]The top bunk Ravenclaw beds are never used. That's because there are no animations for students climbing into the top bunks.
[*]Named-NPC's remain fully clothed when they go to bed. I may fix this in future but it won't be easy.
[*]Named-NPC's in some Houses remain awake in the Common Room all night, just like the player character. I guess they all took a No-Sleep Potion. This is because there are no available beds for them to sleep in. I put them in the Common Room (rather than leave them at their default location) to make them easy to locate and to avoid breaching curfew. You can follow them when they leave to find out where they go during the day.
[*]Some features work better in certain House Common Rooms than others. These are game bugs. (For example, when the students leave for Breakfast/Dinner you'll only see a couple leave the Hufflepuff and Slytherin Common Rooms. That's because those Common Rooms are so large that you can only see half of the room. Instead of making NPC's walk all the way from the far end, the game just de-spawns them.)
[*]Sometimes the named-NPC's spawn in a bunch and do nothing for a while. This is a game bug.
[*]In the game files Ominis Gaunt is listed as a 1st year. I assume that's a mistake. I've made him a 5th year.
[*]In the game files Sacharissa Tugwood is listed as a 2nd year. She looks older to me so I made her a 4th year.
[*]In the game files Lucan Brattleby is listed as a 2nd year. He looks older to me so I made him a 3rd year.
[*]Some students in the Great Hall (T4's) appear & disappear randomly when you look away from them. This is just how the game works.
[*]If the Prof has an active or pending mission (or even just a speech bubble) they won't attend classes. This is a game feature/bug.
[*]If a named-NPC has an active or pending mission (or even just a speech bubble) they won't attend classes. This is a game feature/bug.
[/list][color=#00ff00][size=5]Acknowledgements[/size][/color]

HUGE thanks to nathdev without whom this mod would not have been possible.

[color=#00ff00][size=5]Timetables - Meals[/size][/color]

name: Indonesia Melayu Filipino Subtitle - Hogwarts Legacy - Austronesian Lang Pack
summary: Replace Hogwarts Legacy English Localization with Bahasa Indonesia, Melayu, or Filipino.
description:
[color=#00ffff][size=4][i][center][b]Hogwarts Legacy - Bahasa Indonesia, Melayu, Filipino Translations[/b][/center][/i][/size][/color][center][size=1]
Hello everyone,
If you plan to reupload this mod and bypass the mod permissions above, I probably can't stop you. But I’m genuinely asking for a little bit of your kindness.
Please do not remove "AUSTRONESIAN" from the title. If giving direct credit is too much trouble, could you please just link back to this page?
I work really hard building [url=https://karyain.net/pipeline]translation architecture[/url]﻿﻿, and linking back to my Nexus page just like I link my [url=https://trakteer.id/skripsimu.myid/]Trakteer [/url]﻿or [url=https://ko-fi.com/skripsimumyid]KoFi [/url]﻿to this page﻿﻿ is a small gesture that helps me keep doing what I do.
Please be kind to mod authors. Your support keeps more "culturally nuanced" translations coming.[/size][/center][img]http://karyain.net/released.php[/img]
[size=4][b]MOD DESCRIPTION[/b][/size]

The journey of a fifth-year student through the hallowed halls of Hogwarts and the sprawling Scottish Highlands is a tale of wonder, ancient secrets, and the weight of a wizarding legacy. To bring this magical odyssey to life for our community, this project provides a localized experience translated from the English source text.

While official localizations can sometimes feel stiff or overly literal, this mod aims to inject local "flavor" and cultural nuance. My goal is to reject rigid, robotic translations in favor of language that captures the whimsical yet high-stakes atmosphere of the 1800s Wizarding World.

[center][b]AVAILABILITY[/b][/center]

[center]?? Bahasa Indonesia

[youtube]N3g-qe4xpxQ[/youtube]
?? Bahasa Melayu

[youtube]iBSDkdD04Jw[/youtube]
?? Tagalog / Filipino

[youtube]ryCuoLmcZP0[/youtube][/center]

[b]CREDITS & SPECIAL THANKS[/b]

Haziq Faruqi: For defining the localization style and tone for the Malay translation.

[b]HOW TO INSTALL
[/b]
Installation is simple. (Please delete any translation mod first).

[list=1]
[*]Download the main file and unzip the archive.
[*]Open your preferred language folder (e.g., Indonesia).
[*]Find your Hogwarts Legacy installation directory (where the Phoenix folder is located).
[*]Drag the Phoenix folder from your chosen language folder into the main game directory.
[*]If prompted to merge or overwrite, select Yes.
[*]Launch the game.
[/list]
[b]STATISTICS & QA[/b]

Hogwarts Legacy features a large lines (approx. 30,000+ lines). To ensure quality, I use a smart inspector to calculate Semantic Scores weighted by text length, vibe similarity via classification, and some overly complex clustering.

[img]https://karyain.net/api/card?slug=hogwartslegacy[/img]

[url=https://karyain.net/game/hogwarts-legacy]Hogwarts Legacy Bahasa Indonesia, Melayu, Filipino. NLP Statistics and Sample.[/url].

P.S. This project is currently in an Experimental state. Until it reaches the Release Candidate (RC) version, expect some "weird" translations, untranslated text and a watermark (approx. 4%; reduced from 6% in previous release). [i]For now, fully translated text are only available for supporters[/i]. But this mod is totally playable for everyone.

[b]Please don't forget to add feedback or language style critiques in comment section, I'm adding roughly 3% untranslated text WITH COORDINATE so you can compare it with translated text (I hope it's spread evenly) and report it in comment section.

Please. F-E-E-D-B-A-C-K. THANKS.[/b]

[img]https://staticdelivery.nexusmods.com/mods/5113/images/2421/2421-1769775191-750552567.png[/img]

[center][size=6]PLEASE KEEP THE MOD FREE!
DON'T LET IT GO BEHIND A PAYWALL![/size][/center]
